sentence: 她喜欢打扮，愿意有朋友，可是这都不过是一些小小的、哀而不伤的、青春的游戏
translation_en: She enjoys dressing up and wants to have friends, but it's all just some small, sad but not painful, games of youth.
translation_zh: 她喜欢打扮，想要交朋友，但这一切只是青春里一些小小的、悲伤的，却并不痛苦的游戏。

sentence: 看她俩挨肩搭背的样子，就知道是一对好朋友
translation_en: Just by looking at how they were leaning on each other, you could tell they were best friends.
translation_zh: 仅仅是看着他们靠在一起的样子，你就能知道他们是最好的朋友。

sentence: 那个人极端自私，爱财如命
translation_en: That person is extremely selfish and loves money above all else.
translation_zh: 那个人非常自私，把钱看得比什么都重。

sentence: 他长期以来安常守故，缺乏锻炼，因而经不起挫折
translation_en: He has always been content with his routine, lacking exercise, and therefore cannot withstand setbacks.
translation_zh: 他一直满足于自己的日常，缺乏锻炼，因此无法承受挫折。

sentence: 各国都应采取一些安富恤贫的措施，以保障社会的安定
translation_en: All countries should take some measures to ensure both wealth and poverty alleviation, in order to safeguard social stability.
translation_zh: 所有国家都应该采取一些措施，确保财富和减贫，以维护社会稳定。

sentence: 在敌人的强大攻势下，我军阵地安如泰山
translation_en: Despite the enemy's fierce onslaught, our troops held their ground firm as Mount Tai.
translation_zh: 敌军猛攻，我军却坚守阵地，稳如泰山。

sentence: 能够找到职业，找到安身之处，该是多么令人高兴啊
translation_en: It's so wonderful to find a job and a place to call home.
translation_zh: 找到工作和一个家真是太棒了。

sentence: 他长期以来安时处顺，缺乏锻炼，因而经不起挫折
translation_en: He had always lived a comfortable life, lacking exercise, so he couldn't withstand setbacks.
translation_zh: 他一直过着舒适的生活，缺乏运动，所以经不起挫折。

sentence: 太阳过了，整个天空又显得暗淡无光，北风在头项上呼呼地嚎叫着
translation_en: The sun had set, and the whole sky seemed dim and lifeless. A north wind howled over my head.
translation_zh: 太阳落山了，整个天空显得暗淡无生机。北风在我头顶呼啸着。

sentence: 上自王后，下至弄臣，骇得凝结着的神色也应声活动起来，似乎感到暗无天日的悲哀
translation_en: From the queen dowager down to the lowest servant, even their frozen expressions stirred, as if sensing the overwhelming despair of utter darkness.
translation_zh: 从太后到最卑微的侍女，就连僵硬的表情也微微动了一下，仿佛在感受到无边的绝望和彻骨的黑暗。

sentence: 先生有志于木刻，是极好的事，但访木刻家是无益的，因为就是已有成绩的木刻家，也还在暗中摸索
translation_en: It's wonderful that you aspire to wood carving, but seeking out wood carvers won't be helpful, because even accomplished wood carvers are still exploring in secret.
translation_zh: 你想要学习木雕真是太好了，但寻找木雕师可能没有帮助，因为即使是经验丰富的木雕师也在秘密探索。

sentence: 阳光孤零零地落在街心上，也觉黯然无色
translation_en: The sunlight fell lonely on the center of the street, seeming dull and lifeless.
translation_zh: 阳光孤零零地洒在街中央，显得暗淡无生机。

sentence: 某些人做事不从实际出发，往往昂首天外
translation_en: Some people do things without considering reality, often with their heads held high in the clouds.
translation_zh: 有些人做事不考虑现实，常常头脑飘浮。

sentence: 天空中那只老鹰遨翔自得，真让人羡慕
translation_en: The eagle soaring freely in the sky, truly enviable.
translation_zh: 天空翱翔的雄鹰，令人羡慕。

sentence: 我国目前蚕茧总产量已超过了日本，国际蚕丝市场上，我们已鳌头独占了
translation_en: China's current total silkworm cocoon production has surpassed Japan, and we have taken the lead in the international silk market.
translation_zh: 中国目前的蚕茧总产量已超过日本，在国际丝绸市场占据领先地位。

sentence: 傲不可长，像他那样傲慢的孩子，家长应加强教育
translation_en: Arrogance cannot last, parents of children who are as arrogant as him should strengthen their education.
translation_zh: 骄傲不能长久，骄矜的孩子父母应该加强教育。

sentence: 这也是个好办法，而且简单易行，不过还不是拔本塞源之计
translation_en: This is also a good solution, simple and easy to implement, but it's not a cure for the root of the problem.
translation_zh: 这也是一个不错的方案，简单易行，但它不能解决问题的根本原因。

sentence: 那种不顾学生能否接受的填鸭式的教学方法，无异于拔苗助长
translation_en: That cram school teaching method that ignores whether students can accept it is like forcing seedlings to grow, which will harm them in the long run.
translation_zh: 那种忽视学生是否能接受的补习方法，就像强迫幼苗快速生长一样，长久来看会损害他们。

sentence: 如今这里已拔帜易帜，另换新主了
translation_en: The flag has been changed, and new masters have taken over.
translation_zh: 旗帜已经更换了，新的主人接管了。

sentence: 这幅抽象画，对一般人来说都是白雪难和
translation_en: This abstract painting is incomprehensible to most people.
translation_zh: 这幅抽象画大多数人难以理解。

sentence: 老妇人于是百般抚慰，把自己年轻时抚慰孩子的语句，一一背了出来
translation_en: The old woman then comforted her in every way she could, reciting all the words she used to comfort her own children when they were young.
translation_zh: 老妇人便用尽一切办法安慰她，念着当年安抚自己孩子时的那些话。

sentence: 美术展览会上展出了许多新作品，百花齐放，各具风格
translation_en: Many new works were showcased at the art exhibition, with a dazzling array of styles on display.
translation_zh: 艺术展览上展出了许多新作，风格多种多样，令人眼花缭乱。

sentence: 对报名参军的人挑选很严格，可以说是百里挑一
translation_en: The selection process for those who sign up to join the army is very strict, it can be said that they choose one out of a hundred.
translation_zh: 报名参军的人员选拔非常严格，可以说是一百选一。

sentence: 这种怪事百年难遇，今天倒开了眼界
translation_en: I've never seen anything like this in all my years.
translation_zh: 我一辈子都没见过这样的东西。

sentence: 古人都知道百年树人的道理，我们更应该把培养人才这件大事抓好
translation_en: Everyone knows that it takes a hundred years to cultivate a person, and we should pay even more attention to nurturing talent.
translation_zh: 人养育百年，更应注重培养人才。

sentence: 这真是令人百思莫解
translation_en: This is truly baffling.
translation_zh: 这真是令人费解。

sentence: 在百无聊赖中，随手抓过一本书来，科学也好，文学也好，横竖什么都一样
translation_en: Out of sheer boredom, I randomly grabbed a book, it didn't matter if it was science or literature, anything would do.
translation_zh: 纯粹无聊，我随便抓了一本书，是科学还是文学都无所谓，什么都可以。

sentence: 由于金融危机的缘故，造成了经济动荡，百业萧条
translation_en: Due to the financial crisis, the economy has become unstable and businesses are struggling.
translation_zh: 由于金融危机，经济变得不稳定，企业经营困难。

sentence: 对孩子百依百从是不行的
translation_en: It's not good to always give in to a child.
translation_zh: 总是迁就孩子不好。

sentence: 从古到今，人们总是唾弃那些败德辱行的人
translation_en: Throughout history, people have always scorned those who are corrupt and immoral.
translation_zh: 历史 boyunca 人们一直鄙视腐败不道德的人。

sentence: 自古以来，因为奸臣陷害忠良，以致败国亡家，这种例子也不少
translation_en: Throughout history, because treacherous officials have framed loyal and righteous people, leading to the downfall of nations and families, there have been many such examples.
translation_zh: 历史上，由于奸臣陷害忠良，导致国家和家庭覆灭的例子不胜枚举。

sentence: 大英雄说话板上砸钉，你既然还愿意给弟兄们办事，那就看你说的吧
translation_en: A true hero hammers nails on a board, if you're still willing to do things for your brothers, then it depends on what you say.
translation_zh: 真正的英雄钉板子，如果你还愿意为兄弟做事，那就要看你说什么了。

sentence: 差多了，差多了！人到三十五，就半截入土了
translation_en: That's way too much!  At thirty-five, you're already half buried.
translation_zh: 太多了！三十五岁了，你已经埋了一半了。

sentence: 他不理会内行的嗤笑，写啊改啊，改啊写啊，终于写出了好作品，成了一个颇有希望的半路出家的作家
translation_en: He ignored the scoffs of the experts, writing and rewriting until he finally produced a good work and became a promising writer who had taken up the craft later in life.
translation_zh: 他无视专家的嘲笑，一遍又一遍地修改写作，最终创作出一部优秀作品，成为一名晚年才开始习文的有潜力的作家。

sentence: 想跑，水裹住他的脚，他就那么半死不活的，低着头一步一步的往前曳
translation_en: He wanted to run, but the water held his feet captive. He trudged forward, half-dead, head bowed, taking one agonizing step at a time.
translation_zh: 他想要奔跑，但水却将他双脚牢牢束缚。他拖着沉重的步伐向前走，半死不活地低着头，每一步都无比痛苦。

sentence: 爷爷虽然年纪很大了，但宝刀未老，依然每天出去晨练
translation_en: Although my grandfather is very old, he's still sharp as a tack and goes for his morning run every day.
translation_zh: 虽然我的爷爷年纪很大，但他仍然头脑敏捷，每天都去晨跑。

sentence: 人们那被晒黑的饱经风霜的脸上，显出严肃而紧张的神情
translation_en: The tanned, weather-beaten faces of the people revealed expressions of seriousness and tension.
translation_zh: 人们皮肤黝黑，风霜满面，表情凝重紧张。

sentence: 小小的燕子，浩莽的大海，飞着飞着，不会觉得倦么？不会遇着暴风疾雨么？我们真替它们担心呢
translation_en: Little swallows, the vast ocean, flying and flying, won't they get tired? Won't they encounter storms and heavy rain? We truly worry for them.
translation_zh: 小燕子，茫茫大海，飞呀飞，不会累吗？不会遇到风暴和暴雨吗？我们真替他们担心。

sentence: 生活的艰辛，爱憎的苦恼，使她产生了悲观厌世的情绪
translation_en: The hardships of life, the anguish of love and hate, led her to develop a pessimistic and world-weary outlook.
translation_zh: 生活的艰辛，爱情与仇恨的痛苦，使她养成了悲观而世界厌倦的态度。

sentence: 悲喜交集的父亲紧紧抱住了久别的儿子
translation_en: The father, overwhelmed with mixed emotions, tightly embraced his long-lost son.
translation_zh: 父亲情绪复杂，紧紧拥抱了久别的儿子。

sentence: 背信弃义是插在我背上的一把尖刀
translation_en: Breaking faith is like a dagger plunged into my back.
translation_zh: 背叛如同匕首刺入我的后背。

sentence: 女儿刻苦、自觉、用功，全靠笨鸟先飞保持了各门功课全班第一
translation_en: Her daughter is diligent, self-motivated, and studious, maintaining first place in all her subjects thanks to her "slow bird gets the worm" approach.
translation_zh: 她的女儿勤奋、主动、好学，凭借“慢工出细活”的学习方法，所有科目都名列第一。

sentence: 可以说差不多的人都是逼上梁山的
translation_en: Those who are pushed to their limits are all alike.
translation_zh: 极限逼迫下，每个人都一样。

sentence: 大家彼此彼此，没有什么区别
translation_en: We're all the same.
translation_zh: 我们都是一样的。

sentence: 一个闭目塞听、同客观外界根本绝缘的人，是无所谓认识的
translation_en: A person who closes their eyes and ears to the outside world, completely cut off from objective reality, is incapable of true understanding.
translation_zh: 闭目塞耳，与客观现实完全隔绝的人，无法真正理解。

sentence: 这是我发表的第一篇作品，虽然幼稚，但弊帚自珍，一直藏着
translation_en: This is my first piece of writing, though naive, I cherish it dearly and have kept it hidden all along.
translation_zh: 这首作品是我写的第一篇，虽然有些稚嫩，但我却非常珍惜它，一直藏了起来。

sentence: 发现和掌握规律，就是从个别中找到了一般，从变动不居的现象中找到了相对稳定的本质
translation_en: Discovering and mastering laws means finding the general from the particular, and the relatively stable essence from ever-changing phenomena.
translation_zh: 发现和掌握规律，就是从个别中发现一般性，从不断变化的现象中找到相对稳定的本质。

sentence: 我们不能做表里不一的人
translation_en: We cannot be two-faced.
translation_zh: 我们不能两面三刀。

sentence: 我前信的所谓‘怕闹出麻烦’，先生误会了意思，我是说怕刊物因为我而别生枝节
translation_en: My previous letter's "fear of causing trouble" was misunderstood, sir. I meant that I was afraid the publication would have further complications because of me.
translation_zh: 我之前信中“担心惹麻烦”的表达，先生您可能误解了。我的意思是，我担心因为我而导致出版物出现更多复杂情况。

sentence: 他们除双手外，别无长物，其经济地位和产业工人相似
translation_en: They had nothing but their two hands, their economic status similar to that of industrial workers.
translation_zh: 他们只有两手，经济状况与工业工人相似。

sentence: 你就在这儿吧，冰天雪地的上哪儿去
translation_en: Just stay here, where else would you go in this freezing weather?
translation_zh: 就待在这儿吧，这天气这么冷，你去哪儿呢？

sentence: 至此，我们已经获得了充分的谅解，并从心底深处感到在一起谈一谈是件很愉快的事。最初的对立早已冰消雪释了
translation_en: We have now reached a full understanding, and from the bottom of our hearts, we feel it is a pleasure to talk together.  The initial opposition has long since melted away.
translation_zh: 我们现在已经完全理解了，发自内心地感到很高兴能与大家交流。最初的反对意见早已消散。

sentence: 我们要讲究饮食卫生，防止病从口入
translation_en: We should pay attention to food hygiene to prevent illness from entering through the mouth.
translation_zh: 我们应该注意食品卫生，防止疾病通过口进入身体。

sentence: 又是病魔缠身，又是多难的岁月！他又绝望了
translation_en: He was once again plagued by illness, enduring yet another difficult period. He felt despair.
translation_zh: 他又一次被病痛折磨，经历着另一个艰难的时期。他感到绝望。

sentence: 这本书的作者一定是位博闻强识的学者
translation_en: The author of this book must be a learned scholar with extensive knowledge.
translation_zh: 这本书的作者一定是一位博学多才的学者。

sentence: 世间也尽有不辨菽麦的人
translation_en: There are people in the world who cannot distinguish between wheat and barley.
translation_zh: 世界上有些人分辨不出小麦和大麦。

sentence: 军情紧急，现派你们出发侦察，三小时后必须回来，不得违误
translation_en: The military situation is urgent. I am dispatching you to conduct reconnaissance now. You must return in three hours, without fail.
translation_zh: 军情紧急，我现在派你立即进行侦察。三小时内必须返回，不许逾期。

sentence: 一条毛巾或两刀稿纸，咱们还能没地方去‘拿’？拿来送给他，这就叫不费之惠
translation_en: We can't possibly run out of places to "get" even a towel or two sheets of paper, can we?  Just bring them over and give them to him; that's what I call effortless generosity.
translation_zh: 我们不可能连毛巾或两张纸都找不到吧？直接拿过来给他，这就是我说的毫不费力的大方。

sentence: 两位追求者的才学、家世都一样优秀，不分伯仲，让她不知如何抉择
translation_en: Both suitors were equally accomplished and well-born, leaving her torn about whom to choose.
translation_zh: 两位求婚者都出身名门，才华出众，让她左右为难。

sentence: 有些人为了个人私利，便不顾大局而做出损害公众利益的事情
translation_en: Some people, for their own personal gain, disregard the bigger picture and do things that harm the public interest.
translation_zh: 有些人为了个人私利，不顾大局，做损害公共利益的事情。

sentence: 尽管有外人在，他还是不管不顾的撞进来了
translation_en: Despite the presence of outsiders, he barged in recklessly.
translation_zh: 尽管有外人，他仍莽撞地闯了进去。

sentence: 既然他已经承认了错误，我们就可以不咎既往了
translation_en: Since he has already admitted his mistake, we can let bygones be bygones.
translation_zh: 既然他已经承认错误了，我们可以不计较了。

sentence: 音乐会上，演员的歌声不绝如缕
translation_en: The singer's voices flowed continuously throughout the concert.
translation_zh: 歌手的歌声贯穿了整个演唱会。

sentence: 这可以说是不刊之论，我有同感
translation_en: This is an unpublishable opinion, I agree.
translation_zh: 这是一个不能发表的意见，我同意。

sentence: 这篇文章论点不严密，不堪一击
translation_en: The article's argument is flimsy and easily refuted.
translation_zh: 这篇文章的论点薄弱，很容易被反驳。

sentence: 怀疑与猜忌，难道就竟已成了他们不可救药的根性了吗
translation_en: Could suspicion and jealousy have become their incurable nature?
translation_zh: 怀疑和嫉妒是否已经成为他们无法治愈的本性？

sentence: 他的成绩并非不可企及，我们只要奋发努力，一定能赶上他
translation_en: His grades aren't out of reach, we just need to work hard and we can catch up to him.
translation_zh: 他的成绩不是遥不可及的，只要我们努力，就能赶上他。

sentence: 一片澄澈的蔚蓝色的天宇，高深得不可思议
translation_en: A sky of incredible depth, clear and azure blue.
translation_zh: 一片深邃、清澈的碧蓝天空。

sentence: 当时我真悲哀到不可言状
translation_en: I was so heartbroken I couldn't even express it.
translation_zh: 我心碎到无法言表。

sentence: 不过，他们就得准备实行这样的决议，这是不可移易的
translation_en: However, they have to prepare to implement this resolution, it's non-negotiable.
translation_zh: 然而，他们必须准备实施这项决议，这是不可商量的。

sentence: 在他看来，上海的学生娃和山寨的青年之间，是有着一道不可逾越的鸿沟的
translation_en: In his view, there is an unbridgeable chasm between Shanghai students and those young people from rural areas.
translation_zh: 在他看来，上海的学生和来自农村的年轻人之间存在着无法逾越的鸿沟。

sentence: 各位以为如何？兄弟说的不对的地方，还请不吝指教
translation_en: What do you all think? Please feel free to correct my brother if he is wrong.
translation_zh: 大家怎么看？ 觉得我弟弟不对的地方可以直说。

sentence: 你看它，埋没地下，不露声色，生命的每一秒种都在为完成自己的使命而苦斗
translation_en: Look at it, buried underground, hidden from view, every second of its life is a struggle to fulfill its mission.
translation_zh: 看着它，埋藏在地下，隐于视线之外，每一秒都是为了完成使命而奋斗。

sentence: 我学习写评论性质的文章，给自己立了两个标准。一个是独立思考，另一个是不落俗套
translation_en: I've been studying how to write opinion pieces, setting two standards for myself. One is independent thinking, and the other is originality.
translation_zh: 我一直都在学习写评论文章，给自己设定了两个标准：一个是独立思考，另一个是原创性。

sentence: 在确定销售计划之前，应先进行市场调查，以免做出不切实际的预测
translation_en: Before finalizing the sales plan, market research should be conducted first to avoid making unrealistic predictions.
translation_zh: 在确定销售计划之前，应先进行市场调研，避免做出不切实际的预测。

sentence: 粮食要有充分的储备，以应不时之需
translation_en: There should be ample reserves of grain to meet unforeseen needs.
translation_zh: 应有充足的粮食储备以应对突发需求。

sentence: 给你们读一点古书总是好意；古书又不是毒药，竟会这样胡闹起来，这明明是不识好歹呀
translation_en: It's always kind of me to read you some ancient texts; they aren't poison, so why all this fuss? You're clearly ungrateful.
translation_zh: 给我念些古文算是一种善意吧，又不是毒药，怎么这么 fussy？你真是忘恩负义。

sentence: 什么年月了，还吃这碗饭，太不识时务了
translation_en: What year is it, still eating this kind of food? You're so out of touch.
translation_zh: 还吃这种东西，是哪一年了？你真是过时了。

sentence: 在那时候他们是被骂为不务正业的青年，但没人知道当时的社会已无青年们可务的正业
translation_en: They were labeled as idle youths back then, but no one knew that society had no legitimate jobs for young people at the time.
translation_zh: 他们当时被贴上了“游手好闲”的标签，但没有人知道那个时候社会根本没有适合年轻人合法工作的岗位。

sentence: 虽受过多年的感化教育，他仍然不改偷窃的恶习，这样的人已是让人不屑教诲的了
translation_en: Despite years of moral education, he still hasn't given up his thieving ways. Such a person is beyond redemption.
translation_zh: 尽管多年来接受了道德教育，他依然没有放弃偷盗的行为。这样的人已经无法救赎。

sentence: 刚才着了凉的不爽快，也就不药而愈了
translation_en: The discomfort from catching a chill didn't subside, so it just lingered.
translation_zh: 受凉后的不适没有消退，一直持续存在。

sentence: 人民群众是历史的创造者，这确是不易之论
translation_en: The people are the creators of history, which is undoubtedly a profound statement.
translation_zh: 人民是历史的创造者，这无疑是一个深刻的论断。

sentence: 可是人们不由分说，还是狠狠地打了他一顿，还用马刀把所有的布袋都砍破了，把车子也劈掉了
translation_en: But people didn't listen and beat him severely, slashing all his bags with a saber and even hacking up his car.
translation_zh: 但是人们没有听，对他痛打了一顿，用刀砍破了他的所有包，甚至把他的车也砍毁了。

sentence: 他的残忍和狠毒，时而不知不觉地在老人面前显露出来
translation_en: His cruelty and viciousness would sometimes surface unwittingly before the old man.
translation_zh: 他的残忍和恶毒有时会无意间在他面前显露出来。

sentence: 这篇文章逻辑性太差，使人看了不知所云
translation_en: This article is poorly structured, leaving the reader confused.
translation_zh: 这篇文章结构混乱，使读者感到困惑。

sentence: 我接下这项工程后，才发觉自己有些不知自量
translation_en: After taking on this project, I realized I was in over my head.
translation_zh: 接手这个项目后，我意识到自己能力不足。

sentence: 对于他所提有关修改方案的提议，完全没有事实根据，不值一驳
translation_en: His proposal to amend the plan is baseless and unworthy of refutation.
translation_zh: 他的修改计划草率无理，不值得反驳。

sentence: 那些工作作风实不足为法
translation_en: Their work style is really unprofessional.
translation_zh: 他们的工作方式很不专业。

sentence: 祝你今年步步高升
translation_en: Wishing you continuous promotions this year.
translation_zh: 祝您今年一路升职加薪。

sentence: 他在一场车祸中不幸遇难，那场景真是惨不忍睹
translation_en: He died tragically in a car accident, the scene was truly horrific.
translation_zh: 他在一场车祸中悲惨身亡，现场十分恐怖。

sentence: 这个地方曾经是一个藏污纳垢的黑窝
translation_en: This place was once a den of iniquity.
translation_zh: 这个地方以前是罪恶之地。

sentence: 事情出了岔子的时候，插科打诨，轻松的把责任卸在别人头上
translation_en: When things went wrong, he deflected blame onto others with jokes and lightheartedness.
translation_zh: 当事情出问题时，他用玩笑和轻松的态度把责任推卸给别人。

sentence: 要维持民族和国家的长久地位，还有道德问题，有了很好的道德，国家才能长治久安
translation_en: To maintain the long-term status of both the nation and its people, moral issues are also important. A country can only achieve lasting peace and stability with strong morals.
translation_zh: 维护国家和人民的长远利益，道德问题同样重要。一个国家只有道德建设牢固，才能实现长治久安。

sentence: 常备不懈的国防力量是国家安全的保证
translation_en: A steadfast and unwavering national defense force is the guarantee of national security.
translation_zh: 坚定的、不屈不挠的国防力量是国家安全的保障。

sentence: 铲除路面上的积雪，才能使道路再度畅行无阻
translation_en: Clearing the snow from the roads will allow them to be passable again.
translation_zh: 清理积雪后，道路就能通行。

sentence: 政策要力求相对地稳定，不能朝令夕改
translation_en: Policies should strive for relative stability and avoid frequent changes.
translation_zh: 政策应力求相对稳定，避免频繁变动。

sentence: 你们成群结党的来这里干什么
translation_en: What are you all doing here together?
translation_zh: 你们都在这里做什么？

sentence: 朋友聚会是有的，为什么要夫妇两个一同去？这算显示你们是成双作对吗
translation_en: There's a gathering of friends, why do you both have to go as a couple?  Is that showing you're always together?
translation_zh: 朋友聚会，你们为什么非要成双成对地去呢？是想表现出你们总是形影不离吗？

sentence: 这两段文字中应有几句承上启下的话
translation_en: There should be a few transitional phrases between these two passages.
translation_zh: 这两段之间应该有一些过渡性短语。

sentence: 文中这句话起到了承先启后的作用
translation_en: This sentence serves as a bridge between the previous and subsequent ideas.
translation_zh: 这句话是前后的思想之间的桥梁。

sentence: 我们要乘其不意打击敌人
translation_en: We will strike the enemy by surprise.
translation_zh: 我们将会出其不意地打击敌人。

sentence: 到了橙黄桔绿的时候，到处都是丰收的景象
translation_en: When oranges, yellows, reds, and greens abound, scenes of harvest fill every corner.
translation_zh: 橘黄红绿满山野，丰收景象处处可见。

sentence: 她是一个逞强好胜的女孩子，一听这话，哪能忍受的下
translation_en: She's a headstrong, competitive girl; she couldn't possibly stand to hear that.
translation_zh: 她是一个意志坚定、好胜的女孩，她绝对无法接受这个。

sentence: 这种吃里爬外的事，我劝你不要做
translation_en: I advise you not to do this kind of thing that betrays one's own people.
translation_zh: 我劝你最好不要做这种背叛自己人 的事情。

sentence: 某报创刊以来，一向持论公允，所以人人爱读它
translation_en: That newspaper has always been known for its fair and impartial reporting, which is why everyone loves to read it.
translation_zh: 这家报纸一直以公正客观地报道著闻名，所以大家都喜欢读它。

sentence: 由于两汉辞赋的发展，这种侈丽闳衍的写作技巧，给当时文人以一种新的启发
translation_en: The development of Han dynasty prose poetry inspired writers with a new kind of writing style that was extravagant, grand, and expansive.
translation_zh: 汉代散文诗的发展，激发了文人以一种华丽、宏大、博大的新式写作风格。

sentence: 头一晚醉得倒下马来，第二天照样冲锋陷阵。不能喝酒，还能当军人吗
translation_en: He got so drunk the first night that he fell off his horse, but the next day he charged into battle again. If you can't drink, how can you be a soldier?
translation_zh: 他第一天喝醉了，从马上摔下来，第二天又冲进了战场。不能喝酒，怎么能当兵呢？

sentence: 今天，那美丽的三千里江山还有半壁笼罩着愁云惨雾
translation_en: Today, even that beautiful three thousand mile landscape is shrouded in half by clouds of sorrow and gloom.
translation_zh: 今天，就连那美轮美奂的三千里山水也都被忧愁和阴霾的云雾笼罩了一半。

sentence: 以初生之犊的勇气，站在一切战斗的前列
translation_en: With the courage of a newborn calf, standing at the forefront of every battle.
translation_zh: 初生牛犊不怕虎，立于前线。

sentence: 大学已经毕业了，这正是他雏鹰展翅的时侯
translation_en: He has graduated from university, this is the time for him to spread his wings.
translation_zh: 他大学毕业了，是时候展翅高飞了。

sentence: 人在触景生情的时候，能联想起很多往事
translation_en: When people experience nostalgia, they can recall many past events.
translation_zh: 怀旧时，人们可以回忆起许多过去的事情。

sentence: 平日这灯下，便是我们的天堂；今日却成了地狱了，没有一个地方一件事情，不是使我触目伤心的
translation_en: Under this lamp, it was our paradise every day; today it has become hell, with nothing but things that make me heartbroken.
translation_zh: 在灯光下，那曾经是我们的天堂；如今却成了地狱，满目皆是令人心碎的景象。

sentence: 欢迎兄弟单位来我厂传经送宝
translation_en: We welcome our fellow comrades to visit our factory and share knowledge and experience.
translation_zh: 我们欢迎同志们参观我们的工厂，交流知识和经验。

sentence: 这个办法可以有吹糠见米的效果
translation_en: This method can have the effect of separating the wheat from the chaff.
translation_zh: 这种方法可以起到筛选精华的作用。

sentence: 春华秋实，没有那浩荡的春风，又哪里会有这满野秋色和大好的收成呢
translation_en: Spring blossoms lead to autumn harvests; without the grand spring breeze, where would there be this abundance of autumn colors and bountiful yields?
translation_zh: 春花盛开，秋实丰收；若无春风浩荡，何来秋色斑斓与硕果累累？

sentence: 春去秋来，他觉得自己真的老了
translation_en: Spring goes, autumn comes, he feels he's truly grown old.
translation_zh: 春去秋来，他感到自己老了。

sentence: 这两家公司有着多种业务关系，正所谓是唇亡齿寒
translation_en: The two companies have many business dealings with each other, as the saying goes, "When the lips perish, the teeth grow cold."
translation_zh: 两家公司往来密切，正如俗语所说：“唇亡齿寒”。

sentence: 据点里的敌人又蠢蠢欲动
translation_en: The enemy at the outpost is stirring again.
translation_zh: 前哨上的敌人又开始活动了。

sentence: 因受的打击太大，他已经辍毫栖牍了
translation_en: He has been completely devastated by the blow and has withdrawn from all activities.
translation_zh: 他被打击彻底摧毁，并从所有活动中退缩了。

sentence: 这是一个严肃的问题，决不允许使用村学究语
translation_en: This is a serious matter, and the use of village scholar language is absolutely forbidden.
translation_zh: 这是一件严肃的事情，使用村塾语言绝对禁止。

sentence: 我们厂的领导与群众打得火热
translation_en: Our factory leaders have close ties with the masses.
translation_zh: 我们的厂领导与群众关系密切。

sentence: 当孩子由于要求没有得到满足而发脾气或打滚撒泼时，大人不要去理睬他
translation_en: When a child throws a tantrum or acts out because their demands aren't met, adults should ignore them.
translation_zh: 当孩子发脾气或因为要求没有得到满足而闹情绪时，大人应该忽视他们。

sentence: 这一回，得看你是不是大彻大悟，决心离开下流社会，迈步走进上流社会了
translation_en: This time, it depends on whether you've truly had an epiphany and are determined to leave behind the lower class and step into high society.
translation_zh: 这次，取决于你是否真的顿悟了，并决心抛弃底层身份，跃入上流社会。

sentence: 批评者的眼界是小的，所以他不能在大处落墨
translation_en: The critic's vision is narrow, so he cannot see the bigger picture.
translation_zh: 这位评论家的视野狭隘，所以他看不清全局。

sentence: 现在我们进了牢狱便是‘得仁’，那是大错特错
translation_en: Now that we're in prison, to say we've attained benevolence is a grave mistake.
translation_zh: 现在进了监狱，说我们达到了仁义，那是严重的错误。

sentence: 我一定要报答你的大恩大德
translation_en: I will definitely repay your great kindness.
translation_zh: 我一定会报答你的大恩大德。

sentence: 擎火把的都是年轻的农民，另一只手提着枪，也有拿镐的，大呼小叫的嚷嚷着
translation_en: The young farmers, each holding torches, shouted and yelled as they marched with guns in one hand and picks in the other.
translation_zh: 年轻的农民们，每个人手里都拿着火把，一边喊叫着，一边用枪和锄头在手中挥舞着向前行进。

sentence: 从一九年以来，她才仿佛从大梦初醒似的，又从事于版画了
translation_en: Since 19, she has seemed to wake from a long dream and returned to printmaking.
translation_zh: 自从19年开始，她似乎从一个长久的梦中醒来，回到了版画创作。

sentence: 出国留学人员回国后也是大有可为的
translation_en: Overseas students can still make significant contributions after returning home.
translation_zh: 留学生回国后仍可做出重要贡献。

sentence: 我们很佩服他在处理此事过程中所展示的大智大勇
translation_en: We greatly admire his wisdom and courage displayed throughout this process.
translation_zh: 我们非常敬佩他在整个过程中展现出的智慧和勇气。

sentence: 那几个军人和财主，一个个呆如木鸡
translation_en: Those soldiers and wealthy landowners stood there like wooden chickens.
translation_zh: 那些士兵和富 landowner 就像木鸡一样站在那里。

sentence: 他对事能从各方面看，能有充分的谅解精神，因此他的待人接物都有很合理的态度
translation_en: He is able to consider matters from all angles and has a deep understanding, so he treats people with reasonable attitudes.
translation_zh: 他能够从各个角度考虑问题，对事物有着深刻的理解，因此对待他人态度合理。

sentence: 我们对此不能淡然处之，要引起高度重视
translation_en: We cannot remain indifferent to this; it requires our utmost attention.
translation_zh: 我们不能对这件事置之不理，它需要我们高度重视。

sentence: 随着农业机械化的普及，刀耕火种的那种原始的农业耕作技术已逐渐消失了
translation_en: With the popularization of agricultural mechanization, the primitive farming techniques of slash-and-burn agriculture have gradually disappeared.
translation_zh: 随着农业机械化的普及，砍伐烧荒的原始耕作方式逐渐消失。

sentence: 那时候，姑姑教给你那‘德言工容’，就大有用处了
translation_en: That came in handy when your aunt taught you "demeanor and appearance" back then.
translation_zh: 那时候你阿姨教你“仪态和相貌”的时候，这派上用场了。

sentence: 但是确实存在着这种典型，而且为数相当地多，为害相当地大，不可等闲视之的
translation_en: However, this type of case does exist, and there are quite a few of them, causing considerable harm. It cannot be ignored.
translation_zh: 然而，这种类型的案件确实存在，而且数量不少，造成相当大的危害。不能忽视。

sentence: 一看他就知他非等闲之辈
translation_en: At first glance, he knew he was no ordinary person.
translation_zh: 一眼就能看出他很不简单。

sentence: 想当初，我在城里头作艺，不肯低三下四地侍候有势力的人，教人家打了一顿
translation_en: Back then, I made my living as an artist in the city and refused to grovel before those with power, which got me beaten up.
translation_zh: 那时候我在城市里靠艺术为生，拒绝向权贵低头，结果被打了一顿。

sentence: 同学们在日常学习中，应该有滴水穿石的精神
translation_en: Students should have the spirit of perseverance, like water wearing away stone, in their daily studies.
translation_zh: 学生应该像水滴石穿一样，在日常学习中保持坚持不懈的精神。

sentence: 我们希望这种颠倒是非的时代快些过去
translation_en: We hope this era of right and wrong being reversed will pass quickly.
translation_zh: 我们希望是非颠倒的时代能够尽快过去。

sentence: 我所感到悲哀的，是有几个同我来的学生，至今还找不到学校进，还在颠沛流离
translation_en: What saddens me most is that some of the students who came with me are still unable to find a school to attend and remain displaced.
translation_zh: 最让我难过的是，有一些跟我一起来的学生仍然没有找到学校，还在流离失所。

sentence: 奶奶年岁大了，做起事来常常是颠三倒四的
translation_en: Grandma is getting old, so she often gets things mixed up.
translation_zh: 奶奶年纪大了，所以经常把东西弄混了。

sentence: 还没成人，就叫他自己顶门立户，自己奔日子
translation_en: He's not even an adult yet, and they expect him to support himself and his family.
translation_zh: 他还没成年，他们就期望他能自食其力，养活自己和家人。

sentence: 在动荡不定的岁月里，他始终保持这个良好习惯
translation_en: Throughout turbulent times, he always maintained this good habit.
translation_zh: 在动荡的时期，他始终保持着这个好习惯。

sentence: 每个青年都应该努力向上，刻苦学习，使自己成为国家的栋梁之才
translation_en: Every young person should strive to improve, study diligently, and become a pillar of the nation.
translation_zh: 每一位年轻人应该努力进取，刻苦学习，成为国家的栋梁之才。

sentence: 我不害怕你的毒手尊拳
translation_en: I am not afraid of your venomous fist.
translation_zh: 我不怕你的毒拳。

sentence: 他也不信任母亲，有意见就独断独行
translation_en: He also doesn't trust his mother and acts unilaterally when he has an opinion.
translation_zh: 他也不信任母亲，有意见就独自行动。

sentence: 我们要有钝学累功的精神才能有所进步
translation_en: We need the spirit of diligent learning to make progress.
translation_zh: 我们需要勤奋学习的精神来取得进步。

sentence: 过去，我多愁善感，看什么都没有意思；父母对我不好，引起我对世界上一切都憎恨
translation_en: In the past, I was very sentimental and found nothing interesting. My parents were unkind to me, which made me resent everything in the world.
translation_zh: 过去我非常多愁善感，什么都觉得没意思。父母对我不好，让我对这个世界充满了怨恨。

sentence: 现在这样的局面，我们是有办法对付的，要迎接困难，多难兴邦
translation_en: We have ways to deal with this current situation. We should embrace the difficulties, for they build a strong nation.
translation_zh: 我们有应对当前局面的办法。我们要迎接挑战，因为困难造就强大的国家。

sentence: 谁都明白多钱善贾的道理
translation_en: Everyone understands the importance of being generous.
translation_zh: 大家都理解慷慨的重要性。

sentence: 这一点事，也值得你躲躲闪闪老半天总不肯说
translation_en: This matter is also worth you avoiding and evading for so long, refusing to say anything.
translation_zh: 这件事也值得你躲避逃避这么久，拒绝说任何话。

sentence: 饿殍载道的灾后景象是不会再出现了
translation_en: The post-disaster scene of widespread starvation and death will never happen again.
translation_zh: 灾后大规模饥饿和死亡的景象永远不会再次发生。

sentence: 她完全没有读过书，但她单凭耳濡目染，也认得一些字，而且能够暗诵得好些唐诗
translation_en: She has never read any books, but she can recognize some characters just from what she's heard and seen, and she can even recite some Tang poems by heart.
translation_zh: 她从未读过任何书，但她能从听到和看到的内容中认出一些字，甚至能背诵一些唐诗。

sentence: 最合理的孝道恐怕是继承父辈的成就，把它发扬光大，好教下一辈得到更好的精神的与物质的遗产
translation_en: The most reasonable filial piety is probably to inherit the achievements of one's parents, carry them forward, and pass on a better spiritual and material legacy to the next generation.
translation_zh: 最合理的孝道，大概就是继承父母的成就，发扬光大，并将更好的精神和物质遗产传给下一代。

sentence: 谁个惩办要严，谁个处罚从轻，农民都有极明白的计算，罚不当罪的极少
translation_en: Everyone knows exactly who will face harsh punishment and who will receive leniency, farmers have a very clear understanding of this.  Few are punished for crimes they didn't commit.
translation_zh: 大家都清楚谁会受到严厉惩罚，谁会得到宽大处理，农民对此有着非常清晰的认识。很少有人因为未犯的罪行而受罚。

sentence: 我们不希望看到法出多门的局面
translation_en: We do not want to see a situation where things spiral out of control.
translation_zh: 我们不想看到情况失控。

sentence: 我国的戏剧艺术越来越繁荣昌盛了
translation_en: The theatrical arts in our country are becoming increasingly prosperous and flourishing.
translation_zh: 我国的戏剧艺术日益繁荣昌盛。

sentence: 我们都有反哺之私，赡养老人是天职
translation_en: We all have a desire to repay our parents, and caring for the elderly is our duty.
translation_zh: 我们都有一种报答父母的愿望，照顾老人是我们的责任。

sentence: 经过反复推敲，我们终于选择了这个方案
translation_en: After much deliberation, we finally chose this plan.
translation_zh: 经过长时间的考虑，我们最终选择了这个计划。

sentence: 这次事故，你是有责任的，你应该反躬自省
translation_en: You bear responsibility for this accident and should reflect on your actions.
translation_zh: 你对此事故负有责任，应该反省自己的行为。

sentence: 这并不是外来的异物，而是泛应曲当的真理
translation_en: This is not an external object, but a universally applicable truth.
translation_zh: 这不是一个外部物体，而是一个普遍适用的真理。

sentence: 当他听到这个不利的消息后，显得仿徨失措
translation_en: He seemed lost and at a loss when he heard the bad news.
translation_zh: 他听到坏消息后，显得迷茫失措。

sentence: 对中小学生的校外活动，要加强辅导，不能放任自流
translation_en: Extracurricular activities for middle and primary school students should be strengthened with guidance and not left unsupervised.
translation_zh: 中小学生课外活动应加强指导，不宜无人监管。

sentence: 我羡慕那种飞遁离俗的隐居生活
translation_en: I envy that kind of secluded hermit life, free from worldly concerns.
translation_zh: 我羡慕那种隐居山林，远离尘世的生活。

sentence: 这对他来说就像飞龙乘云一样
translation_en: It's like a dragon riding the clouds for him.
translation_zh: 对他来说，就像一条龙在云上飞翔。

sentence: 你不能对她有非分之念
translation_en: You shouldn't have inappropriate thoughts about her.
translation_zh: 你不应该对她有那些不合适的念头。

sentence: 对于她的日夜的操心，使我也不能不一同操心，来算作分甘共苦
translation_en: Her constant worry weighs on me too, making me share her burden.
translation_zh: 她的不断担忧也压在我身上，让我分担她的负担。

sentence: 我们彼此之间感情不和，早已分路扬镳了
translation_en: We have long since gone our separate ways due to our strained relationship.
translation_zh: 由于关系紧张，我们早已分道扬镳。

sentence: 这个东西分文不值
translation_en: This thing is worthless.
translation_zh: 这东西一文不值。

sentence: 有着粉饰太平的职责的人们是可原谅的，因为他们也有理由麻木
translation_en: People who have the responsibility to paint a rosy picture can be forgiven, because they also have reasons to become numb.
translation_zh: 有责任描绘美好图景的人，可以被原谅，因为他们也有麻木的理由。

sentence: 我们用自己动手的方法，达到了丰衣足食的目的
translation_en: We achieved our goal of having enough to eat and wear by doing things ourselves.
translation_zh: 我们通过自力更生，实现了吃穿不愁的目标。

sentence: 过去被忘却了的煤堆，风吹日晒，现在忽然大家争着去把他团成煤球收藏起来
translation_en: The coal piles, once forgotten, weathered by wind and sun, are now suddenly being fought over to be shaped into coal balls and collected.
translation_zh: 那些被遗忘的煤堆，经风化日晒，如今却突然被人争抢着，要被打造成煤球收集起来。

sentence: 南国的春天风光旖旎，使人陶醉
translation_en: The spring scenery in the south is enchanting, intoxicating people.
translation_zh: 南方的春景迷人，令人陶醉。

sentence: 戒严令风行雷厉。不准集会，也不准罢课
translation_en: Martial law was strictly enforced. Gatherings were prohibited, as were strikes.
translation_zh: 戒严令严格执行。禁止集会和罢工。

sentence: 难以想象，他是怎样渡过那风雨交加的日子的
translation_en: It's hard to imagine how he got through those stormy days.
translation_zh: 很难想象他如何度过了那些风雨飘摇的日子。

sentence: 我们办事要认真负责，不应采取敷衍了事的态度
translation_en: We should be serious and responsible in our work and should not adopt a perfunctory attitude.
translation_zh: 我们工作上应该认真负责，不能敷衍塞责。

sentence: 在这篇作品中，突出体现了主人公为人民扶危济困的英雄主义气概
translation_en: This work highlights the protagonist's heroic spirit of helping people in need.
translation_zh: 这部作品突出了主人公助人为乐的英雄精神。

sentence: 我是愿意人对我反抗，不合则拂袖而去
translation_en: I welcome resistance against me, and if you disagree, I will leave.
translation_zh: 我欢迎对我的反对，如果你不同意，我会离开。

sentence: 他们习惯于猛于虎的官威，以为老百姓只要一加威吓，便自会俯首帖耳
translation_en: They are accustomed to the might of officials, believing that the common people will submit meekly at the slightest show of force.
translation_zh: 他们习惯了官员的威严，认为百姓稍有强势便会乖乖服从。

sentence: 不甘心做俯仰由人的傀儡
translation_en: Unwilling to be a puppet, manipulated by others.
translation_zh: 不愿做别人的傀儡。

sentence: 该公司由于连年亏损，负债累累，不久便宣告倒闭
translation_en: The company, due to years of losses and mounting debt, declared bankruptcy soon after.
translation_zh: 公司多年亏损，债务累累，不久后宣布破产。

sentence: 写文章应力求简洁，一切附赘悬疣尽量删除
translation_en: Writing should be concise, and all extraneous details should be removed.
translation_zh: 写作要简洁，删除所有无关细节。

sentence: 父亲到处寻找着富国强民的救国良策，但他终于没有找到
translation_en: His father searched everywhere for a good plan to save the country and enrich its people, but he ultimately failed to find one.
translation_zh: 他父亲到处寻找拯救国家、富裕人民的好计划，但最终没有找到。

sentence: 他只有奋力冲上这座山峰，才有可能摆脱腹背受敌的困境
translation_en: Only by making a desperate dash to the top of this mountain could he possibly escape his predicament of being attacked from both sides.
translation_zh: 只有拼命冲到这座山顶，他才能有可能摆脱左右夹击的困境。

sentence: 在过去说来，她这个小命运已是被盖棺论定了，然而在今天，这一切都要重新估计
translation_en: Her fate had been sealed, but today everything needs to be reevaluated.
translation_zh: 她的命运已注定，但今天一切都需要重新评估。

sentence: 她是负有使命的人，都是罄着所有生命之力在奔跑，他也就不愿甘居人后了
translation_en: She is a person with a mission, pouring all her life force into running, and she refuses to fall behind.
translation_zh: 她是一个有使命感的人，把毕生精力都投入到跑步中，决不落后。

sentence: 还必须使全国广大人民群众觉悟，甘心情愿和我们一起奋斗，去争取胜利
translation_en: We must also raise the awareness of the broad masses of the people throughout the country, so that they willingly join us in our struggle for victory.
translation_zh: 我们也必须提高全国人民的觉悟，使他们自愿参加我们的胜利斗争。

sentence: 我们只有使自己操练得高人一等，才有战略胜利的可能
translation_en: Only by training ourselves to surpass others can we have a chance of strategic victory.
translation_zh: 只有通过训练超越他人，我们才能有机会获得战略胜利。

sentence: 他们的切身的问题，也使他们无暇去高瞻远瞩的去关心与分析世界问题
translation_en: Their pressing personal concerns left them with no time to consider and analyze world issues from a broader perspective.
translation_zh: 他们急迫的个人问题让他们没有时间去考虑和分析世界问题的更广泛视角。

sentence: 我不习惯这种膏粱纨裦般的生活
translation_en: I'm not used to this pampered lifestyle.
translation_zh: 我不习惯这种优渥的生活方式。

sentence: 卖糖小孩在我面前的地位，正如我在膏腴子弟面前的地位一样
translation_en: The position of a child selling candy in front of me is just like my position in front of pampered children from wealthy families.
translation_zh: 我面前卖糖果的孩子，和我在富家孩子面前的位置一样。

sentence: 国家要稳步向前发展，就必须革奸铲暴，创造一个良好的社会环境
translation_en: For the country to develop steadily, it must purge corruption and eliminate violence to create a good social environment.
translation_zh: 为了国家稳定发展，必须清除腐败、消除暴力，营造良好的社会环境。

sentence: 全国人民都要有说话的机会，都要有衣穿，有饭吃，有事做，有书读，总之是要各得其所
translation_en: Everyone in the country should have the opportunity to speak, to have clothes to wear, food to eat, work to do, and books to read. In short, everyone should find their place.
translation_zh: 全国每个人都应该有机会说话、穿衣、吃饭、工作，以及读书。简而言之，每个人都应该找到自己的位置。

sentence: 儿童乐园里的玩具各式各样，真是好玩极了
translation_en: The toys in the children's playground are of all kinds, so much fun!
translation_zh: 儿童游乐场里的玩具种类繁多，玩起来真有趣！

sentence: 后来他们被敌人隔开，各自为战
translation_en: Later, they were separated by the enemy and fought on their own.
translation_zh: 后来，他们被敌人分开，各自战斗。

sentence: 这真是亘古新闻
translation_en: This is ancient news.
translation_zh: 这是老新闻了。

sentence: 同学之间应团结互助，绝不能因一点小事就耿耿于怀
translation_en: Students should unite and help each other, and they absolutely must not hold grudges over small matters.
translation_zh: 学生应该团结互助，切勿因小事记仇。

sentence: 这两幅山水画工力悉敌，很难分出高下
translation_en: These two landscape paintings are both masterfully executed, making it difficult to say which is better.
translation_zh: 这两幅山水画都技艺精湛，难以抉择哪幅更佳。

sentence: 你不至于被这狗吠之惊所吓倒吧
translation_en: You're not scared off by a dog barking, are you?
translation_zh: 狗叫你不会害怕吧？

sentence: 这不过姑妄言之罢了，哪一个能办这件事
translation_en: It's just idle talk, who could actually do this?
translation_zh: 这只是闲聊，谁会真的做到呢？

sentence: 我们已经脱离了过去那种慢慢发展的孤军作战的情况
translation_en: We have moved beyond that situation of slow, solitary development.
translation_zh: 我们已经超越了那种缓慢孤独的发展阶段。

sentence: 你可以从明亮的窗玻璃后面看到古色古香的字画、瓷器、铜鼎和小铜佛等等
translation_en: You can see ancient paintings, porcelain, bronze cauldrons, and small bronze Buddhas from behind the bright window glass.
translation_zh: 透过明亮的玻璃窗，你可以看到古代的绘画、瓷器、青铜鼎和小型青铜佛像。

sentence: 研究古典文学要坚持古为今用的原则
translation_en: Studying classical literature requires adhering to the principle of "using the ancients to understand the present."
translation_zh: 学习古典文学需要遵循“用古知今”的原则。

sentence: 一对盗贼故伎重演，但被当场抓获
translation_en: A pair of thieves repeated their old tricks but were caught on the spot.
translation_zh: 两名小偷重蹈覆辙，当场被抓。

sentence: 身为政府官员，关心民瘼当为本职
translation_en: As a government official, caring for the well-being of the people should be paramount.
translation_zh: 作为政府官员，人民福祉应该是首要的。

sentence: 如此广土众民的国家说财政经济无办法，真是没有道理的话
translation_en: It's unreasonable to say that a country with such vast territory and numerous people has no solutions for its finances and economy.
translation_zh: 拥有如此广阔领土和庞大人口的国家，说没有解决财政和经济问题的方案是不合理的。

sentence: 从此故乡日离日远，我们几个人，看这光景，不知还有归正首丘的日子么
translation_en: From then on, our hometown grew farther away day by day. We looked at this scene and wondered if we would ever return to our ancestral home again.
translation_zh: 从那时起，我们的家乡一天天离我们越来越远。看着这一幕，我们不禁 wondering 是否还能再回到祖家。

sentence: 这点如不弄明了，简直等于是海中捞月一样了
translation_en: If this isn't clarified, it's like trying to fish for the moon in the sea.
translation_zh: 如果不清不楚，就像在海里捞月亮。

sentence: 他想起母亲十多年来含辛茹苦的生活所指望者，就是他，然而现在她将不再看见他的儿子了
translation_en: He remembered that his mother had endured so much hardship for over ten years, all for him, but now she would never see her son again.
translation_zh: 他想起母亲为了他，整整十年忍受了那么多苦难，如今却再也见不到儿子了。

sentence: 冷锋过境，寒风侵肌，人们尽量不出门，致使娱乐场所生意清淡
translation_en: A cold front passed through, bringing icy winds that chilled to the bone. People stayed indoors as much as possible, resulting in a slow business for entertainment venues.
translation_zh: 冷锋过后，凛冽的寒风席卷而来，让人骨头发寒。人们尽量待在室内，导致娱乐场所生意清淡。

sentence: 在劳动竞赛中，大家干得汗流浃背
translation_en: Everyone worked hard, sweating profusely in the labor competition.
translation_zh: 大家在劳动竞赛中努力工作，汗流浃背。

sentence: 古人所渴想的诗境是具现在眼前来了，是豪情逸致吗？不，一点也不
translation_en: The poetic realm that ancients yearned for has arrived before our eyes, is it a display of unrestrained passion and elegance? No, not at all.
translation_zh: 古人向往的诗意世界，如今呈现在我们眼前，难道是激情与优雅的尽情挥洒吗？不，绝不是。

sentence: 好梦难圆，你不要白费功夫了
translation_en: Dreams are hard to come by, don't waste your effort.
translation_zh: 梦想难得，莫要浪费精力。

sentence: 我们要把这两个车间合二为一
translation_en: We will merge these two workshops into one.
translation_zh: 我们将把这两个车间合并成一个。

sentence: 我很为你恳挚纯真的感情，无保留合盘托出的气度和敏锐深入的思考所打动
translation_en: I am moved by your sincere and genuine feelings, your generous openness, and your sharp and insightful thinking.
translation_zh: 我被你的真诚和真挚的情感、慷慨的开阔以及敏锐的洞察力所感动。

sentence: 学校认为这个方案合情合理，就定为制度
translation_en: The school believes this plan is reasonable and has decided to make it a rule.
translation_zh: 学校认为这个计划合理，已决定将其作为规定。

sentence: 这件事对国家对个人都有益处，何乐不为
translation_en: This matter benefits both the country and individuals, so why not do it?
translation_zh: 这件事对国家和个人都有好处，何不这样做呢？

sentence: 假若有人愿意来看他，他是个顶和蔼可亲的人
translation_en: If anyone is willing to see him, he's a very kind and approachable person.
translation_zh: 如果有人愿意见他，他会给人一种非常善良、容易相处的感觉。

sentence: 邻里之间应当团结友爱，和睦相处
translation_en: Neighbors should live in unity, friendship, and harmony.
translation_zh: 邻居应该和睦相处，友爱和谐。

sentence: 老人一辈子最重要的格言是‘和气生财’
translation_en: The most important maxim for the old man throughout his life was "harmony brings wealth."
translation_zh: 老人一生最看重的格言是“和合致富”。

sentence: 他见了启事便跑到书店里来，谈了些和衷共济的话
translation_en: Upon seeing the notice, he rushed to the bookstore and discussed matters of mutual aid and support.
translation_zh: 看到通知后，他急忙跑到书店，讨论了互助互助的事宜。

sentence: 可是社会和家庭一样，依然到处发着腐朽霉烂的臭味，黑漆一团
translation_en: But society, just like families, is still rife with rot and decay.
translation_zh: 但社会，就像家庭一样，依然充满腐朽和衰败。

sentence: 他横眉立眼的冲着老教师说‘她不来吗，这也只少得到她一个人啦，跟我们开不开会有好大关系呢？’
translation_en: He glared at the old teacher and said, "She's not coming? Then we'll just have to do without her. It makes a big difference whether she joins us or not."
translation_zh: 他怒视那位老教师，说：“她不来？那我们只好没有她了。她参加与否影响很大。”

sentence: 床下横七竖八有几双花鞋
translation_en: There are several pairs of embroidered shoes scattered under the bed.
translation_zh: 床下散落着几双绣花鞋。

sentence: 这位老画家善于用烘云托月的笔法描画山水
translation_en: This old painter is skilled at using the technique of "framing clouds to set off the moon" to paint landscapes.
translation_zh: 这位老画家擅长用“借云衬月”的技巧来画山水。

sentence: 我居然逃过了这一关，真是洪福齐天，就是每年开一次庆祝会也不算过分
translation_en: I actually managed to pass this level, it's truly a blessing from heaven. It wouldn't be too much to have a celebration every year.
translation_zh: 我竟然通过了这个关卡，真是天赐良机。每年庆祝一下也不为过。

sentence: 这孩子一点规矩也不懂，猴头猴脑的
translation_en: This child has no manners at all, he's wild and unruly.
translation_zh: 这个孩子一点礼貌都没有，太放荡不羁了。

sentence: 做事要小心，万一出了什么意外就后悔莫及了
translation_en: Be careful when doing things, you'll regret it if something unexpected happens.
translation_zh: 做事要小心，万一出意外就后悔了。

sentence: 任何一个学科都不可后继无人
translation_en: Every discipline must have successors.
translation_zh: 每门学科都必须有接班人。

sentence: 这才囫囵半片地听出点意思
translation_en: Only then did I catch a glimpse of what it meant.
translation_zh: 只有那时，我才略微领悟到它的含义。

sentence: 我听说那人喝醉了酒，心里倒宽了不少，胡作胡为都不由他的意思，我们又何必怪他
translation_en: I heard that man got drunk, his heart felt much lighter, he was acting recklessly without even caring about his own thoughts, so why should we blame him?
translation_zh: 我听说那个人喝醉了，心里感觉轻松了很多，胡乱行事，连自己的想法都不管，所以我们为什么要责怪他呢？

sentence: 糊里糊涂是办不好事的
translation_en: Being muddledheaded won't get things done.
translation_zh: 糊涂不清解决不了问题。

sentence: 这个小男孩长得虎头虎脑，非常可爱
translation_en: This little boy is cute with a strong, sturdy build.
translation_zh: 这个小男孩很可爱，身材强壮结实。

sentence: 于是文章也就不能划一不二，可说之处说一点，不能说之处便罢休
translation_en: Therefore, the article cannot be uniform and absolute; one should speak where there is something to say, and remain silent where there is nothing to say.
translation_zh: 因此，文章不能一成不变，绝对化；应该有话要说的时候说，没有话要说的时候保持沉默。

sentence: 她听出话里有话，怕嚷下去再被人掀出丑来，就咕噜着走了
translation_en: She heard there was more to his words, afraid that if she argued further, more dirt would be dug up on her, so she mumbled and left.
translation_zh: 她觉得他的话还有其他意思，怕再争论下去会挖出她的更多黑历史，于是低声嘟囔着离开了。

sentence: 消息传来，大家立刻欢呼雀跃起来
translation_en: News arrived, and everyone immediately cheered with delight.
translation_zh: 消息传来，大家立刻欢呼雀跃。

sentence: 误解和偏见并不能随着时间的推移而涣然冰释
translation_en: Misunderstandings and prejudice cannot simply melt away with time.
translation_zh: 误解和偏见不能仅仅随着时间消散。

sentence: 然而正感谢有这一些的打，你把铁打成了钢，把泛泛的朋友都打成了患难之交了
translation_en: However, thanks to these hardships, you forged iron into steel and turned casual acquaintances into close friends.
translation_zh: 然而，正是这些磨难，你将铁打成了钢，将泛泛之交变成了至交好友。

sentence: 如果不早作准备，来年汛期患至呼天，就来不及了
translation_en: If we don't prepare early, when the flood season arrives next year, it will be too late to do anything.
translation_zh: 如果我们不提前准备，等到明年洪水季节来的时候，就来不及了。

sentence: 对于这种荒诞无稽的传闻，大家都不可相信
translation_en: Everyone should not believe this absurd rumor.
translation_zh: 大家都不要相信这个荒谬的谣言。

sentence: 只要他们认破迷津，那便回头是岸
translation_en: As long as they see through the fog, they will find their way back to shore.
translation_zh: 只要他们看穿迷雾，就会找到回岸的路。

sentence: 这篇文章含义深刻，使人回味无穷
translation_en: This article is profound and thought-provoking.
translation_zh: 这篇文章深刻且 thought-provoking。

sentence: 对自己的错误和缺点，决不可讳莫高深，应该去寻求他人的帮助并尽快改正
translation_en: One should never try to hide one's own mistakes and shortcomings, but rather seek help from others and correct them as soon as possible.
translation_zh: 不应该试图隐藏自己的错误和缺点，而应该向他人寻求帮助，尽快改正。

sentence: 那些人经常故意混淆视听，影响很坏
translation_en: Those people often deliberately confuse and mislead, with very bad consequences.
translation_zh: 这些人经常故意混淆和误导，后果非常糟糕。

sentence: 祸不单行，那个私立中学因为吃了一家钱庄的倒帐，发不出薪水了
translation_en: Misfortunes never come singly; that private school is unable to pay its teachers' salaries because it lost money from a bank's collapse.
translation_zh: 祸不单行，这家私立学校因为银行倒闭亏损，现在无法支付教师工资。

sentence: 第八条罪状是传播出去，祸国殃民
translation_en: The eighth charge is inciting unrest and endangering the nation.
translation_zh: 第八项指控是煽动不安和危害国家。

sentence: 想开点，别灰心。祸绝福连，会好起来的
translation_en: Cheer up, don't lose heart.  After misfortune comes good fortune, things will get better.
translation_zh: 振作起来，不要灰心。祸福相依，总会有好运来。

sentence: 有些文字，尤其是所谓直译的文字，写得佶屈聱牙
translation_en: Some writing, especially so-called literal translations, is convoluted and difficult to understand.
translation_zh: 一些文字，特别是所谓的逐字翻译，往往冗长难懂。

sentence: 人们站在这幅照片前，感到一种急流勇进的撼人力量
translation_en: People standing before this photograph feel an awe-inspiring force of relentless progress.
translation_zh: 站在照片前的人们，感受到一股势不可挡的进步力量。

sentence: 高考的日子已经可以计日而待了，大家要认真复习
translation_en: The day of the college entrance exam is approaching, everyone should study hard.
translation_zh: 高考的日子越来越近了，大家都要努力学习。

sentence: 对于既成事实的婚姻，我们要通过法律手段解决
translation_en: For established marriages, we will resolve matters through legal means.
translation_zh: 对于已婚夫妇，我们将通过法律途径解决问题。

sentence: 许多人过去有大学问，在社会上有地位，今日却寂寂无闻
translation_en: Many learned individuals who once held positions of influence have now faded into obscurity.
translation_zh: 许多曾经拥有影响力、学识渊博的人，如今已逐渐被人遗忘。

sentence: 她自己隐瞒了两匹次布，还假痴假呆地向人家做报告
translation_en: She concealed two bolts of cloth herself and feigned stupidity to report to others.
translation_zh: 她自己藏了两 bolt 布，装傻充愣地向别人汇报。

sentence: 我们将坚持不渝地支持你的正义行动
translation_en: We will unwaveringly support your just actions.
translation_zh: 我们将坚定不移地支持您的正义行动。

sentence: 平常是异常清静的街面，到这时候两边的街檐便成为肩摩踵接的市场了
translation_en: The usually quiet street becomes a bustling marketplace as evening falls.
translation_zh: 平时安静的街道，傍晚时分变得热闹非凡。

sentence: 南极考察队的队员们，战胜了各种艰难险阻，终于完成了考察任务
translation_en: The members of the Antarctic expedition team overcame all sorts of difficulties and hardships, and finally completed their research mission.
translation_zh: 南极探险队队员们克服了各种困难和艰辛，最终完成了他们的科研任务。

sentence: 在科学研究方面，基础科学知识和应用科学知识应该兼而有之
translation_en: In scientific research, both fundamental and applied knowledge should be cultivated.
translation_zh: 科学研究中，应兼顾基础知识和应用知识的培养。

sentence: 俭以养廉看起来容易，做起来难
translation_en: Living frugally to maintain integrity is easy to say but hard to do.
translation_zh: 节俭生活以保持正直，说起来容易做起来难。

sentence: 她是每天上街去买菜的，自然见多识广，知道这东西的时价
translation_en: She goes to the market every day to buy groceries, so she knows the going rate for things.
translation_zh: 她每天去市场买菜，所以知道物价。

sentence: 一年之后，附近几个村庄的牧童们没有一个有她吹的好，连大人们也交口称赞
translation_en: A year later, none of the shepherd boys from the nearby villages could play as well as she did, and even the adults praised her highly.
translation_zh: 一年后，附近村庄的牧童们谁也无法像她一样弹奏得那么好，就连大人们也对她赞不绝口。

sentence: 满城的彩灯与腾空的焰火交相辉映
translation_en: The city's colorful lanterns and soaring fireworks illuminate each other.
translation_zh: 城市的五彩灯笼和高耸的烟火互相照耀。

sentence: 碰到这个难题，他绞尽脑汁也想不出解决的办法来
translation_en: He racked his brain but couldn't come up with a solution to this problem.
translation_zh: 他绞尽脑汁，还是没有想出解决这个问题的方法。

sentence: 本来，有关本业的东西，是无论怎样节衣缩食也应该购买的
translation_en: Things related to one's profession should be purchased, no matter how much one cuts back on expenses.
translation_zh: 无论如何节俭，与职业相关的物品都应该购买。

sentence: 直到近来，经过许多学者的研究，才知道孩子的世界，与成人截然不同
translation_en: Only recently, through the research of many scholars, have we come to understand that a child's world is vastly different from an adult's.
translation_zh: 直到最近，众多学者的研究表明，孩子的世界与成年人的世界截然不同。

sentence: 为了办好这所学校，大家都是竭力虔心地工作着
translation_en: Everyone is working with all their heart and soul to make this school a success.
translation_zh: 每个人都用尽全力，要把这所学校办成成功。

sentence: 竭智尽力，求得这种最大的贡献
translation_en: I will exert every effort to make the greatest contribution possible.
translation_zh: 我将尽一切努力，做出最大的贡献。

sentence: 每当同学有困难时，老师总是解囊相助
translation_en: Whenever students encounter difficulties, teachers always lend a helping hand.
translation_zh: 每当学生遇到困难，老师总是伸出援助之手。

sentence: 你站在这桌子上，金鸡独立，那一条腿不许放下来
translation_en: You stand on this table, like a golden rooster standing alone, that one leg mustn't come down.
translation_zh: 你站在这桌子上，像一只孤独的金鸡，那只脚不能放下。

sentence: 不信你长个金口玉牙！我故意从屋里取来秤一称
translation_en: I don't believe you have a golden mouth and pearly teeth! I deliberately came from inside to weigh it on a scale.
translation_zh: 我不相信你嘴里有金牙，牙齿是珍珠！我特意从里面走出来，要用秤子称一下。

sentence: 为什么叫麻烦？你的锦囊妙计在哪里呢
translation_en: Where's your brilliant plan then?  Why all the fuss?
translation_zh: 那你精彩的计划在哪儿？闹什么 fuss？

sentence: 他费了一生心血收藏的集邮册子，在水灾时尽付东流
translation_en: His lifetime collection of stamps, which he had painstakingly amassed, was swept away by the flood.
translation_zh: 他毕生收集的邮票，是他辛勤积累的，被洪水冲走了。

sentence: 吸烟有害健康，这是尽人皆知的事实
translation_en: Smoking is harmful to health; it's common knowledge.
translation_zh: 吸烟有害健康，这是常识。

sentence: 所谓有‘价值’，是必须使人看了在‘进德修业’上得到多少的‘灵感’
translation_en: To be of value, something must inspire people to improve themselves morally and intellectually.
translation_zh: 要具有价值，事物必须能够激励人们在道德和智力上提升自己。

sentence: 在我自己的思想上也正感受着一种进退维谷的苦闷
translation_en: I am also feeling a sense of being trapped and stifled in my own thoughts.
translation_zh: 我也感到自己被自己的思绪困住，喘不过气。

sentence: 会场响起经久不息的掌声
translation_en: Applause thundered on and on.
translation_zh: 掌声响个不停。

sentence: 遇到危险情况，应该沉着冷静，不要惊慌失措
translation_en: When facing danger, stay calm and collected; don't panic.
translation_zh: 面对危险时，保持冷静，不要惊慌。

sentence: 这个贝雕画确实是精雕细刻
translation_en: This shell carving is indeed exquisitely detailed.
translation_zh: 这件贝壳雕刻确实非常精细。

sentence: 少数民族的手工艺品真是精美绝伦
translation_en: The handicrafts of ethnic minorities are truly exquisite.
translation_zh: 少数民族的手工艺品真是精美绝伦。

sentence: 在大姐失踪之后，我精神恍惚。领导上这时又要我写个大姐的简历，要进行追功
translation_en: After my elder sister disappeared, I was mentally dazed. My superiors then asked me to write her resume for an award consideration.
translation_zh: 姐姐失踪后，我精神恍惚。领导后来让我为她写一份简历，申请奖项。

sentence: 事物是往返曲折的，不是径情直遂的
translation_en: Things are winding and roundabout, not straightforward.
translation_zh: 事情很曲折，不是直截了当的。

sentence: 即使寻到一点光明，‘径一周三’，却更分明的看见了周围的无涯际的黑暗
translation_en: Even if a glimmer of light is found, 'walking around for three days', it only makes the boundless darkness surrounding it more apparent.
translation_zh: 即使找到一丝光亮，也如同“走三天才”，只会更加凸显它周围无边的黑暗。

sentence: 我喜欢那种锤炼，那种色彩的配合，那种镜花水月
translation_en: I like that kind of refinement, that combination of colors, that mirror-image moonlit water.
translation_zh: 我喜欢那种精致，那样的色彩搭配，那像镜子一样映照着月光的水。

sentence: 值得注意的是山的南北，自然条件迥乎不同
translation_en: It is worth noting that the north and south sides of the mountain have vastly different natural conditions.
translation_zh: 值得注意的是，山南北两侧的自然条件差异很大。

sentence: 炯炯有神的眼光，足够表现出他是一个有志的少年
translation_en: His bright, piercing eyes spoke volumes about his ambition.
translation_zh: 他明亮而锐利的眼睛里充满了野心。

sentence: 我不想旧话重提
translation_en: I don't want to bring up old matters.
translation_zh: 我不想提起往事。

sentence: 用传统的艺术形式，表现新的内容不正是旧瓶新酒吗
translation_en: Isn't expressing new content using traditional art forms just putting new wine in old bottles?
translation_zh: 用传统艺术形式表达新内容，不就是往旧瓶子里倒新酒吗？

sentence: 看校样时的聚精会神，就和在写作的时候一样，因为我的目的要使它没有一个错字
translation_en: When proofreading, I focus intently, just as I do when writing, because my goal is to ensure there are no errors.
translation_zh: 校对时，我专注力极强，就像写作时一样，因为我的目标是确保没有错误。

sentence: 绝子绝孙是骂人的话
translation_en: Calling someone's children and grandchildren nonexistent is an insult.
translation_zh: 称呼别人的子女后代为不存在是侮辱。

sentence: 开中药处方时，要安排好各味药的君臣佐使关系
translation_en: When dispensing traditional Chinese medicine prescriptions, it is important to arrange the relationships between the various herbs as master, minister, assistant, and envoy.
translation_zh: dispensed  traditional chinese medicine 处方时，要注重中药材之间的主、辅、使、佐关系。

sentence: 双方代表开诚相见，就两方面合作事宜达成了一致
translation_en: Both parties met openly and reached an agreement on cooperation matters.
translation_zh: 双方坦诚相见，就合作事宜达成协议。

sentence: 今天的演出是群众文化月的开台锣鼓，更精彩的内容还在后头
translation_en: Today's performance is the opening drumbeat for the Mass Culture Month, with even more exciting content to come.
translation_zh: 今天的演出是文化大众月开幕的号角，接下来还有更多精彩内容。

sentence: 在这开宗明义的第一信里，请你们容我在你们面前介绍我自己
translation_en: In this introductory letter, allow me to introduce myself to you.
translation_zh: 在这封介绍信中，让我向您自我介绍。

sentence: 它跑得那么平稳，使骑马的人仿佛觉得它不是在坎坷不平的路上跑，而是走在极其柔软的地毯上
translation_en: It ran so smoothly that the rider felt as if they were not on a rough road, but on an extremely soft carpet.
translation_zh: 它跑得如此顺畅，骑行者感觉自己仿佛不在崎岖的路上，而是在极柔软的地毯上。

sentence: 有些人惯于看风使舵，看领导眼色行事
translation_en: Some people are used to being swayed by the wind, acting according to their leader's mood.
translation_zh: 有些人习惯被风吹摆，行事随领导情绪。

sentence: 随着教育事业的发展，科班出身的人越来越多
translation_en: As education develops, more and more people are coming from formal academic backgrounds.
translation_zh: 随着教育的发展，越来越多的人拥有正规的学术背景。

sentence: 她活了五十年，第一次感觉到自己还不是一个可有可无的人
translation_en: She felt for the first time in her fifty years that she was not replaceable.
translation_zh: 她五十岁以来，第一次感到自己不可替代。

sentence: 坑蒙拐骗发不了大财，发了小财也长不了
translation_en: Getting rich through deceit won't last, and even if you make some money, it won't grow.
translation_zh: 欺骗致富是不可长久的，即使赚到钱，也无法增值。

sentence: 解放前夕，我们全家六口流落在这座小城市里，口多食寡，连一天三顿饭都无法维持
translation_en: On the eve of liberation, our family of six found ourselves stranded in this small city, with too many mouths to feed and barely enough food to last through three meals a day.
translation_zh: 解放前夕，我们一家六口身处这座小城，人口众多，食物却捉襟见肘，勉强能维持一日三餐。

sentence: 在旧社会，由于地主豪绅无休止的刳脂剔膏，人民的生活十分困苦
translation_en: In the old society, people lived in extreme poverty due to the relentless exploitation by landlords and wealthy gentry.
translation_zh: 在旧社会，人民由于地主和富绅的残酷剥削，生活在极度贫困中。

sentence: 我们要经得起狂风恶浪的冲击
translation_en: We must withstand the onslaught of storms.
translation_zh: 我们必须抵御暴风雨的袭击。

sentence: 有钱的便狂嫖滥赌，没钱的便喝几十碗酒
translation_en: The rich indulge in debauchery, while the poor drown their sorrows in alcohol.
translation_zh: 富人沉溺于享乐，穷人用酒浇愁。

sentence: 我们不能滥用职权去谋私利
translation_en: We cannot abuse our power for personal gain.
translation_zh: 我们不能滥用权力谋取私利。

sentence: 在我自己有记忆的二、三岁时，她已经把唐诗绝句教我暗诵，能诵得琅琅上口
translation_en: When I was two or three years old, she had already taught me to recite Tang poems by heart, so I could recite them fluently.
translation_zh: 我两三岁的时候，她已经教我背诵唐诗了，所以我可以流利地背出来。

sentence: 这班学生因为稂莠不齐，所以管教不易
translation_en: This class of students is difficult to manage because they are unruly.
translation_zh: 这批学生难以管理，因为他们行为不端。

sentence: 不注意科学，一味地蛮干，结果必定是劳而无功
translation_en: Neglecting science and blindly doing things will inevitably lead to toil without results.
translation_zh: 忽视科学，盲目行事，必然会导致劳而无功。

sentence: 我们工作中要注意劳逸结合提高工作效率
translation_en: We should pay attention to balancing work and rest to improve work efficiency.
translation_zh: 我们应该注意工作与休息的平衡，以提高工作效率。

sentence: 我们的团结和友谊是牢不可破的
translation_en: Our unity and friendship are unbreakable.
translation_zh: 我们的团结和友谊牢不可破。

sentence: 他的儿子在前线光荣牺牲，听到这个消息，他不禁老泪纵横
translation_en: His son died heroically on the front lines. Hearing this news, he couldn't help but weep bitterly.
translation_zh: 他的儿子在前线英勇牺牲。听到这个消息，他忍不住痛哭流涕。

sentence: 以前，他不肯抢别人的买卖，特别是对于那些老弱残兵；以他的身体，以他的车，去和他们争座儿，还能有他们的份
translation_en: He used to refuse to take business away from others, especially the elderly, weak, and disabled veterans.  With his body and his vehicle, he wouldn't compete with them for seats, knowing they deserved their share.
translation_zh: 他过去从不抢别人生意，尤其是不愿意抢老弱病残军人。他会用自己的身体和车辆，不跟他们争座，他知道他们也应该得到应有的份额。

sentence: 一时间好像沉进洪荒远古的宁静里，忘记自己，脑子里幻出离奇古怪的神话
translation_en: For a moment, I felt as if I had sunk into the tranquil depths of primeval times, forgetting myself, my mind conjuring up bizarre and fantastical myths.
translation_zh: 那一刻，我仿佛沉入了远古宁静的深处，忘记了自己，脑海里浮现出奇幻离奇的神话。

sentence: 中国是一个礼仪之邦
translation_en: China is a country of etiquette.
translation_zh: 中国是一个礼仪之国。

sentence: 这面墙砌得里出外进的，只好拆了重修
translation_en: This wall was built with the inside facing out, so it has to be torn down and rebuilt.
translation_zh: 这堵墙是内里朝外建造的，所以必须拆除重建。

sentence: 并不等候答复，而正如一般忽然陷于理屈词穷的专横者一样，他立刻把最后一张牌摆出来了
translation_en: Without waiting for a reply, he, like an arrogant person who suddenly finds himself cornered by logic and lacking arguments, immediately played his last card.
translation_zh: 他不等对方答复，像一个突然被逻辑逼到角落，找不到反驳的傲慢者一样，立刻使出了最后一张牌。

sentence: 他在这次会议上力排众议，终于使自己的观点得到了与会代表的支持
translation_en: He overcame strong opposition at the meeting and finally gained support for his views from the attendees.
translation_zh: 他在会议上克服了强烈的反对，最终获得了与会者的支持。

sentence: 力所不及的事情我们也要想办法去做
translation_en: We'll find a way to do things that are beyond our capabilities.
translation_zh: 我们会找到超越我们能力的方法。

sentence: 特别是要用实例、用典型示范去告诉他们组织起来的好处，这种好处是超出单干户力所能及的
translation_en: It is especially important to show them the benefits of organizing through examples and typical demonstrations, benefits that go beyond what individual households can achieve.
translation_zh: 用实例和典型案例向他们展示组织带来的好处尤其重要，这些好处超出了单个家庭所能达到的范围。

sentence: 他一直希望能化解这两家的仇恨，但力有未逮，他们仍然争吵不休
translation_en: He has always hoped to reconcile the two families, but he is powerless to do so, and they continue to fight endlessly.
translation_zh: 他一直希望能调和两家，但无力做到，他们依然不断地争吵。

sentence: 那是力争上游的一种树，笔直的干，笔直的枝
translation_en: That is a kind of tree that strives for progress, with a straight trunk and straight branches.
translation_zh: 那是一种向往进步的树木，树干笔直，枝条挺拔。

sentence: 工作中必须厉行节约，反对浪费
translation_en: Waste must be avoided and frugality practiced at work.
translation_zh: 工作中应避免浪费，践行节约。

sentence: 我们要在社会里混出头，只求不僵，只求不落伍，这是现代人立身处世的名言
translation_en: To make a name for ourselves in society, we only seek to avoid stagnation and to keep up with the times. This is a famous saying about how modern people should conduct themselves in the world.
translation_zh: 为了在社会上立足，我们只求不落后，跟上时代步伐。这是关于现代人应如何处世的名言。

sentence: 天地如此之大，难道竟连一个十八岁的女孩子的立锥之地都没有
translation_en: The world is so vast, yet there isn't even a place for an eighteen-year-old girl to stand her ground.
translation_zh: 世界如此辽阔，连一个十八岁的女孩都找不到立足之地。

sentence: 解决环境污染问题，是与人民健康利害攸关的一件大事
translation_en: Solving environmental pollution is a major issue that directly affects people's health.
translation_zh: 解决环境污染是一个直接影响人们健康的大问题。

sentence: 连绵不断的高山阻挡我们的去路
translation_en: The endless mountains blocked our path.
translation_zh: 绵延的山峰阻挡了我们的道路。

sentence: 这里的丘陵真是连绵起伏
translation_en: The hills here roll on endlessly.
translation_zh: 这里的山丘绵延不断。

sentence: 最初沉醉在男性的柔情里，一年之后，孩子连三接二的来了，又一下子跌入所谓神圣的母爱里了
translation_en: Initially intoxicated by masculine tenderness, a year later, children came one after another, and she suddenly fell into the so-called sacred love of motherhood.
translation_zh: 最初被男性温柔所陶醉，一年后孩子一个接一个地来，她突然陷入了所谓的母爱神圣。

sentence: 我们要注意此事的连锁反应
translation_en: We need to watch out for the chain reaction of this matter.
translation_zh: 我们需要警惕这件事的连锁反应。

sentence: 国家公务员应该廉洁奉公
translation_en: Public servants should be honest and dedicated to the public.
translation_zh: 公务员应该诚实、奉献于公众。

sentence: 只要我们聚在一起，哪怕是吵得脸红耳赤，心里也是甜滋滋的
translation_en: As long as we're together, even if we argue until our faces are red and ears are hot, our hearts will still feel sweet.
translation_zh: 只要我们在一起，即使争吵到脸红耳热，心里还是会甜蜜。

sentence: 这种恋新忘旧的人不值得你难过
translation_en: Someone who is always chasing new things and forgetting old ones isn't worth your sadness.
translation_zh: 总是在追逐新鲜事物，却忘却旧物的，不值得你悲伤。

sentence: 和一位缔交半个多世纪的良师益友诀别，悲痛之情是难以尽述的
translation_en: Bidding farewell to a cherished mentor and friend of over half a century, my sorrow is beyond words.
translation_zh: 告别半个世纪的挚友和恩师，我的悲痛无法用言语表达。

sentence: 你看他走路踉踉跄跄的
translation_en: He walks unsteadily.
translation_zh: 他走路不稳。

sentence: 这两种运动合起来便能够互收效益，分开来定要两败俱伤
translation_en: These two activities, when combined, can mutually benefit each other; separated, they will inevitably lead to mutual destruction.
translation_zh: 这两项活动结合起来，可以互相促进；分开后，势必走向相互毁灭。

sentence: 他做事的时候非常专心，好象两豆塞耳，什么都听不见
translation_en: He is very focused when he does things, as if his ears were plugged with cotton, unable to hear anything.
translation_zh: 他做事非常专注，就像耳朵里塞了棉花，什么都听不见。

sentence: 为朋友两肋插刀，不算什么
translation_en: It's nothing to stick out one's ribs for a friend.
translation_zh: 为朋友豁出命，不算什么。

sentence: 土霸打倒，穷苦人见青天。不是两全其美
translation_en: The tyrant is overthrown, and the poor see a brighter future. It's not a perfect solution for everyone.
translation_zh: 暴君被推翻了，穷人们看到了更美好的未来。但这并非对每个人来说都是完美的解决办法。

sentence: 这下子可不得了啦！真好像烈火烹油，会场一下子炸了——空前的大爆炸
translation_en: This is incredible! It's like oil being heated in a blazing fire, the venue exploded all at once—an unprecedented blast.
translation_zh: 这太不可思议了！就像油在烈火中燃烧，现场一下子爆发了——前所未有的爆炸。

sentence: 临阵磨刀也不顶用，只有靠平时的努力
translation_en: It's no use sharpening your knife at the last minute; only hard work beforehand will do.
translation_zh: 临阵磨刀不快，事前用力方得利。

sentence: 这样零打碎敲也不是办法
translation_en: This piecemeal approach won't work.
translation_zh: 这种分段式的方法行不通。

sentence: 她在大人面前还是这样。那在家里是简直闹得六畜不安
translation_en: She's still like that in front of adults. At home, she drives everyone crazy.
translation_zh: 她跟大人面前还是那样。在家里，她把所有人都气疯了。

sentence: 见那些大哥哥还在龙马精神地说话，她也听不出味道，就打了两个哈欠，悄悄溜了出来
translation_en: Seeing those older brothers still talking with such vigor, she couldn't tell what they were getting at, so she yawned twice and slipped out quietly.
translation_zh: 看着那些哥哥们还在这样兴致勃勃地说话，她不知道他们在说什么，于是打了个两次哈欠，悄悄溜了出去。

sentence: 只记得纸上龙蛇飞舞，笔势很好看的
translation_en: I only remember the dragons and snakes dancing across the paper, the handwriting was very beautiful.
translation_zh: 我只记得龙蛇飞舞在纸上，字迹非常漂亮。

sentence: 但是他的心情十分敞朗，坚信只要度过这段困难日子，局势就会好转，任自己龙腾虎跃
translation_en: But his spirits were high, confident that as long as he got through this difficult period, the situation would improve, allowing him to soar freely.
translation_zh: 但他精神振奋，相信只要度过这段艰难时期，情况就会好转，让他可以自由飞翔。

sentence: 他赶快转过口又说道‘我不过路见不平，说几句气话罢哩！’
translation_en: He quickly changed his tune and said, 'I was just passing by and couldn't help but say a few things out of anger!'
translation_zh: 他语气一转，说：“我只是路过，一时气愤忍不住说了几句！”

sentence: 当年种的小树苗，如今已是绿叶成荫了
translation_en: The saplings planted back then have now grown into lush, shady trees.
translation_zh: 当初种下的幼苗，如今已长成茂密的阴凉大树。

sentence: 琴弹得乱七八糟，可是她的嗓子怪清亮的
translation_en: Her guitar playing was terrible, but her voice was surprisingly clear.
translation_zh: 她的吉他弹得很难听，但她的声音却出奇地清亮。

sentence: 此事我们只略知皮毛，不能擅下结论
translation_en: We only have a superficial understanding of this matter and cannot jump to conclusions.
translation_zh: 我们对这件事的了解还很肤浅，不能妄下结论。

sentence: 今天讲的内容很多，我们抓住荦荦大者就行
translation_en: We'll focus on the most important points from today's lecture.
translation_zh: 我们今天讲座重点内容。

sentence: 只要不轻敌，相信你们一定会马到成功
translation_en: As long as you don't underestimate your opponents, I believe you will surely succeed.
translation_zh: 只要你不低估对手，我相信你一定能成功。

sentence: 从此，我读什么书都不再马马虎虎了
translation_en: From now on, I will read every book carefully.
translation_zh: 从现在开始，我将认真阅读每本书。

sentence: 因为多年买空卖空的结果，文界就荒凉了，文章的形式虽然比较的整齐起来，但战斗的精神却较前有退无进
translation_en: As a result of years of empty speculation, the literary world has become desolate. While the form of writing has become more standardized, its fighting spirit has declined.
translation_zh: 多年空洞的投机之后，文坛变得萧条。形式虽然更加规范，但战斗精神却日渐衰退。

sentence: 如今还不能替老百姓想，瞒上欺下，咱简直不是个人啦
translation_en: We can't think for the people anymore, deceiving those above us while taking advantage of those below. We're hardly human beings at all.
translation_zh: 我们不能再替别人思考，欺骗上级，压榨下属。我们已经不像人类了。

sentence: 为什么倒弄得闹闹攘攘，满城风雨的呢
translation_en: Why has it all become such a commotion, with the whole city in an uproar?
translation_zh: 为什么事情都闹成这样，整个城市都沸腾了？

sentence: 春天来了，漫山遍野都披上了绿装
translation_en: Spring has arrived, and the hillsides are covered in greenery.
translation_zh: 春天到了，山坡上绿意盎然。

sentence: 春天来了，漫天遍地都是杜鹃花
translation_en: Spring has arrived, and azaleas bloom everywhere.
translation_zh: 春天到了，杜鹃花到处开放。

sentence: 科学技术的发展是漫无止境的
translation_en: The development of science and technology is endless.
translation_zh: 科技发展永无止境。

sentence: 我不能叫你盲人瞎马地去乱闯
translation_en: I can't let you blindly stumble around.
translation_zh: 我不能让你胡乱摸索。

sentence: 十句不过懂得三句，其余都茫然不解
translation_en: One only truly understands three out of ten sentences, the rest remain unclear.
translation_zh: 一个人真正理解其中的三成句子，其余的则依然模模糊糊。

sentence: 这是一座孤零零立在大海当中的小岛，四面是茫无涯际的海水和天空
translation_en: This is a small island standing alone in the vast ocean, surrounded by endless seawater and sky.
translation_zh: 这一个小的岛屿独自矗立在浩瀚的海洋中，被无垠的海水和天空环绕。

sentence: 你不要希望蒙混过关
translation_en: Don't try to get away with it.
translation_zh: 别想逃脱。

sentence: 从此以后，以管弦的情绪代替了鼓的情绪，结果都是靡靡之音
translation_en: From then on, orchestral emotion replaced the drum's emotion, resulting in nothing but decadent tunes.
translation_zh: 从此，管弦乐的情绪取代了鼓的激情，只留下颓靡的曲调。

sentence: 这种新见解，对于古书的矛盾可谓面面圆到
translation_en: This new insight resolves the contradictions in ancient texts comprehensively.
translation_zh: 这个新发现全面解决了古籍中的矛盾。

sentence: 如果把我们栽种在阴暗偏陬，那就染上官气暮气，苗而不秀
translation_en: If we are planted in the dark and secluded corners, we will become dull and lackluster, mere seedlings without flourish.
translation_zh: 如果我们被种在黑暗幽静的角落里，我们会变得暗淡无光，仅仅是毫无生机的幼苗。

sentence: 写法又明朗简洁，绝无旧文人描头画角，宛转抑扬的恶习
translation_en: The writing style is clear and concise, completely free of the old scholar's mannerisms of embellishment and flourish, and avoids the bad habit of being overly ornate and melodramatic.
translation_zh: 文风简洁明了，完全摆脱了老学者的修辞繁复和浮夸之态，避免了过于华丽和戏剧化的毛病。

sentence: 在这大时代里，生与死的意义固然都很重大，然而，对于一个生活在空隙当中的人，却又是多么的渺不足道呵
translation_en: In this great era, the meaning of life and death is undoubtedly profound, yet for someone living in the cracks, it feels so insignificant.
translation_zh: 在这个伟大的时代，生与死的意义无疑深刻，但对于生活在裂缝中的某人来说，它却显得如此微不足道。

sentence: 田间是静悄悄的，大路上也是静悄悄的渺无人踪
translation_en: The fields were eerily quiet, as was the main road, deserted and empty.
translation_zh: 田野里异常寂静，主路也同样荒无人烟。

sentence: 这番讲话，既有好教训又说得妙趣横生，给我们官兵以极深刻的印象
translation_en: This speech was both instructive and delightfully witty, leaving a profound impression on our officers and soldiers.
translation_zh: 这篇演讲既富有启迪，又妙趣横生，给我们的军官和士兵留下了深刻的印象。

sentence: 若不是妙手偶得，便确是经过锤炼的语言的精华
translation_en: If it weren't for a stroke of luck, it would undoubtedly be the essence of language honed through refinement.
translation_zh: 如果没有一时的幸运，它无疑就是经过精雕细琢的语言精华。

sentence: 中国的名胜古迹值得我们去参观
translation_en: China's historical sites are worth visiting.
translation_zh: 中国的历史遗迹值得一游。

sentence: 中国的长城名闻遐迩
translation_en: The Great Wall of China is world-renowned.
translation_zh: 长城世界闻名。

sentence: 明眼人可以看出你这是明升暗降的把戏
translation_en: Anyone with eyes can see this is a ploy of apparent promotion but actual demotion.
translation_zh: 有眼睛的人都能看出来，这是表面上是提拔，实际上是降职的把戏。

sentence: 他害怕事情一旦变化，他将有不测大祸，所以跪在地上回答了一句模棱两可的话
translation_en: He was afraid that if things changed, he would face unforeseen disaster, so he knelt on the ground and gave a vague answer.
translation_zh: 他害怕事情改变后会遭遇不可预料的灾难，于是跪在地上支支吾吾地回答。

sentence: 这是第一次出马，人们都摩拳擦掌，心里突突跳着准备战斗
translation_en: This is their first time taking action, everyone is eager to fight, hearts pounding with anticipation.
translation_zh: 这是他们第一次行动，每个人都跃跃欲试，心中激动万分。

sentence: 没有磨杵成针的毅力，学问上就不可能有很深的造诣
translation_en: Without the perseverance to grind a whetstone into a needle, one cannot achieve great mastery in scholarship.
translation_zh: 没有磨砺石成针的毅力，难以成就学业大成。

sentence: 讨论会上，大家都对提出的问题踊跃发表意见，而他却一直默不作声
translation_en: At the discussion, everyone readily shared their opinions on the raised questions, but he remained silent throughout.
translation_zh: 在讨论中，大家都乐于分享对提出的问题的看法，但他全程保持沉默。

sentence: 谁愿意做目光如鼠的人，只是嗅着鼻子前面的一点油香
translation_en: Who wants to be a person who only sees what's right in front of them, sniffing out just a little bit of oil?
translation_zh: 谁愿意做只顾眼前，贪图一丁点油脂的人？

sentence: 这个故事的结尾留下了一个悬念，耐人寻味
translation_en: The ending of this story leaves a lingering mystery.
translation_zh: 这个故事的结局留下了令人费解的谜团。

sentence: 你要通知到村里的男女老少
translation_en: You need to inform everyone in the village, men, women, and children.
translation_zh: 你需要通知村里所有的人，男人、女人和孩子。

sentence: 这个说话南腔北调的人，不适合当解说员
translation_en: This person with a strong regional accent is not suitable to be a commentator.
translation_zh: 这个口音很重的一个人不适合做解说员。

sentence: 现在则相反，除粮食外，每天每人只有五分大洋的油盐柴菜钱，还是难乎为继
translation_en: Now, it's the opposite. Besides grain, each person only has five cents a day for oil, salt, firewood, and vegetables, which is still barely enough to get by.
translation_zh: 现在情况相反了。除了粮食，每个人每天只有五分钱可以买油、盐、柴火和蔬菜，这仍然勉强够用。

sentence: 要这个守财奴募捐，那真是难如登天
translation_en: Getting this miser to donate is like trying to reach the heavens.
translation_zh: 想让这个守财奴捐款，就像要触碰天际一样难。

sentence: 这件事情真是让人难以置信
translation_en: This is truly unbelievable.
translation_zh: 这太不可思议了。

sentence: 这个月开销太大，不到月底就囊空如洗了
translation_en: My expenses this month have been too high, and I'm already broke before the end of the month.
translation_zh: 这个月的开销太高了，月底前我就已经花光了。

sentence: 这些由能工巧匠手工织绣的彩锦，运销世界各地
translation_en: These colorful brocades, handwoven by skilled artisans, are sold worldwide.
translation_zh: 这些色彩鲜艳的手工织锦，由技艺精湛的工匠制作，销往世界各地。

sentence: 这就叫大丈夫能屈能伸
translation_en: A true man can bend but not break.
translation_zh: 大丈夫能屈不能辱。

sentence: 你不妨耐心地听一听逆耳良言，也许这对于你是有好处的
translation_en: It might be beneficial for you to patiently listen to some unpalatable truths.
translation_zh: 耐心地倾听一些不 pleasant 的真相对你可能会有益。

sentence: 趁你们年富力强的时候，为人民做出更多的贡献吧
translation_en: While you are young and strong, make more contributions to the people.
translation_zh: 趁年轻强壮，多为人民奉献。

sentence: 我最初实在替这孩子捏一把汗，待到掘出黄金一釜，这才觉得轻松
translation_en: At first, I was truly worried for this child, but when they unearthed a cauldron of gold, I felt relieved.
translation_zh: 起初，我真的很担心这个孩子，但当他们挖出金锅的时候，我感到安心了。

sentence: 为了不影响别人，同学们在阅览室里走路都是蹑手蹑脚的
translation_en: To avoid disturbing others, the students tiptoe when walking in the reading room.
translation_zh: 为了不打扰别人，学生们在阅览室里走的时候踮着脚尖。

sentence: 只是近来常常在梦中，或是在将醒未醒之顷，一阵悚然，从前所怕的牛头马面，都积压了来，都聚围了来
translation_en: Lately, I often have a sudden fright in my dreams or just as I'm waking up.  The things I used to fear, the ox-head horse-face figures, seem to press in on me, surrounding me.
translation_zh: 最近，我经常在梦里或者刚醒来时突然惊吓。以前害怕的东西，牛头马面，好像要把我包围住。

sentence: 你不要忸怩作态好不好
translation_en: Don't act coy, okay?
translation_zh: 别故作姿态，好吗？

sentence: 你不要扭曲作直了
translation_en: Don't twist it straight.
translation_zh: 别把它弄直了。

sentence: 这种排山倒海的巨潮，是任何顽固势力所不能抵挡得住的
translation_en: This overwhelming tidal wave is unstoppable by any stubborn force.
translation_zh: 这股汹涌的巨浪，任何顽强的力量都无法阻挡。

sentence: 从此之后，中国文坛新旧的界限，判若鸿沟
translation_en: From then on, the divide between old and new in Chinese literature became vast and insurmountable.
translation_zh: 从此，中国文学中老新之分变得越来越深远，难以逾越。

sentence: 到这里来抛头露面，好不识羞
translation_en: To show one's face here is shameless.
translation_zh: 在这里露面太没脸了。

sentence: 他跑马观花地把这部诗剧读了一遍，已经是傍晚时分了
translation_en: He read through the poetic drama leisurely, as if watching horses race and flowers bloom, and it was already evening by the time he finished.
translation_zh: 他悠闲地读完了这出诗剧，仿佛在观看马匹飞驰和花朵盛开，直到傍晚才读完。

sentence: 现在，全大队二十六个山塘水库，已经配套成龙，形成了一个水利灌溉网
translation_en: Now, all twenty-six mountain reservoir ponds in the entire brigade have been integrated into a system, forming an irrigation network.
translation_zh: 现在，全大队二十六个山塘水库已经整合为一个系统，形成了一个灌溉网络。

sentence: 我一见到她就怦然心动
translation_en: My heart skipped a beat when I saw her.
translation_zh: 我一看到她，心脏猛地一跳。

sentence: 我每遇着我所敬爱而知心的人，就喜欢披肝沥胆地畅谈
translation_en: Whenever I meet someone I admire and trust, I like to talk openly and honestly with them.
translation_zh: 每当我遇到敬佩和信任的人，我都很喜欢与他们坦诚地交谈。

sentence: 雨呀，披头盖脑地浇下来，顺脖子灌进去
translation_en: The rain poured down relentlessly, soaking me to the bone.
translation_zh: 雨倾盆而下，把我淋得透湿。

sentence: 这一趟出差弄得疲惫不堪
translation_en: This business trip wore me out completely.
translation_zh: 这次出差让我完全精疲力尽。

sentence: 他总是乐于听取大家的意见，从不偏听偏信
translation_en: He is always willing to listen to everyone's opinions and never takes sides or believes blindly.
translation_zh: 他总是乐于倾听大家的意见，从不偏袒也不盲目相信。

sentence: 回想当年他翩翩年少，不知有多少女孩子为他倾倒
translation_en: Looking back, he was so young and handsome, I wonder how many girls had fallen for him.
translation_zh: 回首往事，他如此年轻英俊，不禁让人好奇有多少少女被他迷倒。

sentence: 现在还常有骈四俪六，典丽堂皇的祭文、挽联、宣言、通电
translation_en: Formal, elegant prose with four-character and six-character phrases is still commonly used in sacrificial texts, eulogies, declarations, and telegrams.
translation_zh: 正式典雅的四字和六字成语在祭祀文、吊唁辞、宣言和电报中仍然常见。

sentence: 他是一名品学兼优的好学生
translation_en: He is an excellent student who excels both academically and morally.
translation_zh: 他是一位学业和品行都出色的学生。

sentence: 学习上的提高总得有个过程，不可能平步登天
translation_en: Improvement in learning always takes time, you can't achieve it overnight.
translation_zh: 学习进步需要时间，不能一蹴而就。

sentence: 你应该多干点实事，不要总评头论足
translation_en: You should focus on doing more practical things instead of just talking about them.
translation_zh: 你应该多做些实际的事情，而不是光说不练。

sentence: 新的内战危机忽然又迫在眉睫了
translation_en: The new civil war crisis has suddenly become imminent.
translation_zh: 新的内战危机突然变得迫在眉睫。

sentence: 我们要破除迷信，解放思想，大胆改革
translation_en: We must dispel superstition, emancipate our minds, and boldly reform.
translation_zh: 我们必须扫除迷信，解放思想，大胆改革。

sentence: 只要我们有破釜沉舟的决心，就能克服学习上的各种困难
translation_en: As long as we have the determination to burn our boats, we can overcome all kinds of learning difficulties.
translation_zh: 只要我们有决心火烧连营，就能克服一切学习困难。

sentence: 我们要破旧立新改变封建意识
translation_en: We must break with the old and establish the new to change feudal consciousness.
translation_zh: 我们必须打破旧的，建立新的，改变封建意识。

sentence: 洪水霎时铺天盖地而来，冲倒了树木和房屋
translation_en: The flood came on suddenly, overwhelming everything and washing away trees and houses.
translation_zh: 洪水突然来袭，势不可挡，冲垮了所有东西，连树木和房屋都被冲走了。

sentence: 他这篇论文没有新意，都是从杂志上东抄西抄，七拼八凑来的
translation_en: His paper lacks originality; it's just a patchwork of ideas copied from magazines.
translation_zh: 他的论文缺乏原创性，充斥着从杂志上抄袭来的零散想法。

sentence: 谁都有妻儿老小的
translation_en: Everyone has a wife, children, and elderly parents.
translation_zh: 每个人都有妻子、孩子和老父母。

sentence: 感情的激动使我说话期期艾艾了
translation_en: My emotions made me stammer.
translation_zh: 我的情绪让我结巴了。

sentence: 工人们齐心合力，只用一天时间就把道路修好了
translation_en: The workers worked together and finished repairing the road in just one day.
translation_zh: 工人协力合作，只用一天就修好了道路。

sentence: 对社会上的一些奇谈怪论，我们要有识别能力
translation_en: We need to be able to distinguish between fact and fiction.
translation_zh: 我们需要能够区分事实和虚构。

sentence: 你不要怕他气焰嚣张的样子
translation_en: Don't be afraid of his arrogant demeanor.
translation_zh: 不要害怕他的傲慢态度。

sentence: 老师举的这个例子恰如其分，同学们很快就掌握了这种方法
translation_en: The teacher's example was perfect, and the students quickly mastered the method.
translation_zh: 老师的例子很完美，学生们很快就掌握了方法。

sentence: 让他们都显显身手，谁能把这个千疮百孔的中国从热火里救出来，算谁有本事
translation_en: Let them all show their skills. Whoever can pull this riddled China out of the fire has the real ability.
translation_zh: 让他们都展示他们的技能吧。谁能够把这个陷入困境的中国拉出火海，才是真正有能力的人。

sentence: 他历尽了千难万险终于回到了阔别五十年的老家
translation_en: After enduring countless hardships, he finally returned to his hometown after fifty years away.
translation_zh: 历经无数磨难，他终于在离开家乡五十年的后，回到了故乡。

sentence: 海洋里的生物千奇百怪，非常迷人
translation_en: The creatures in the ocean are incredibly diverse and fascinating.
translation_zh: 海洋生物种类繁多，令人着迷。

sentence: 有时句法也大约受些影响，而且前车可鉴
translation_en: Sometimes grammar can also be slightly affected, and we have learned from past experiences.
translation_zh: 有时语法也会受到一些影响，我们从过去的经验中学到了。

sentence: 你尚差一年大学毕业，若现在辍学，岂非前功尽废
translation_en: You're only a year away from graduating, if you drop out now, wouldn't all your hard work be for nothing?
translation_zh: 你离毕业只有一年了，要是现在退学，岂不是前功尽弃？

sentence: 放学了，同学们前呼后拥地走出了校园
translation_en: After school, the students streamed out of the campus.
translation_zh: 放学后，学生们涌出校园。

sentence: 这些不法分子的黔驴之计，早已被公安人员识破了
translation_en: These criminals' clumsy tricks have long been seen through by the police.
translation_zh: 这些罪犯拙劣的伎俩早就被警方看穿了。

sentence: 不论所谈论的是政治、宗教或社会问题，均不应把自己的意见强加于人，硬要别人接受
translation_en: Regardless of whether it's about politics, religion, or social issues, one should not impose their own views on others or force them to accept them.
translation_zh: 无论是在政治、宗教还是社会问题上，都不应该强加自己的观点于他人，也不应该逼迫他们接受。

sentence: 二三十只皮鞋的交响曲，登时冲破巷里悄然无声的黑暗
translation_en: A symphony of twenty to thirty pairs of leather shoes burst through the silent darkness of the alley.
translation_zh: 二十到三十双皮鞋的交响乐在寂静的小巷里爆发。

sentence: 每个国家都应严防他国乔装改扮的间谍与特务分子的渗透
translation_en: Every country should guard against infiltration by spies and agents disguised as citizens from other countries.
translation_zh: 每个国家都应该警惕间谍和特工伪装成本国公民的渗透。

sentence: 向企业巧立名目收费的做法是不利于企业发展的
translation_en: Charging businesses with fabricated reasons is detrimental to their development.
translation_zh: 以虚构理由收费损害企业发展。

sentence: 这个商人巧舌如簧，把次品说成是优等品，欺骗消费者
translation_en: The merchant, with silver tongue, spun lies about the inferior goods, deceiving consumers.
translation_zh: 那个商人，口若悬河，谎称劣质商品为上品，欺骗了消费者。

sentence: 只有切身体会的经验才是真实而深刻的
translation_en: Only experiential knowledge gained firsthand is truly profound.
translation_zh: 只有亲身经历所得的知识才是真正深刻的。

sentence: 总算安然改业，否则也许还有一段青黄不接的失业时期
translation_en: He finally managed to find new work, otherwise he might have faced a period of unemployment.
translation_zh: 他终于找到新工作了，否则他可能面临一段失业期。

sentence: 写文章该详的地方要详，不可轻描淡写
translation_en: Where an article needs detail, it should be detailed; do not be superficial.
translation_zh: 文章需要细节的地方，要详细，不要肤浅。

sentence: 谁要是在团结两个字上不生长些诚意，他即使不被人唾骂，也当清夜扪心，有点儿羞愧
translation_en: Anyone who doesn't show sincerity in the word "unity" will feel ashamed even if they aren't publicly criticized.
translation_zh: 任何对“团结”一词不真诚的人，即使不被公开批评也会感到羞愧。

sentence: 下乡只是蜻蜓点水式的，还要带白馒头
translation_en: Going to the countryside is just a superficial visit, they still need to bring white steamed buns.
translation_zh: 去农村只是表面上的走动，他们还得带白馒头。

sentence: 好的诗篇必然是情景交融，理在其中
translation_en: A good poem is inevitably a blend of emotion and scene, with reason woven throughout.
translation_zh: 一首好诗，必然是情感与景物交融的产物，理性贯穿其中。

sentence: 别人亦只能略举大凡，不能穷原竟委
translation_en: Others can only offer a general overview and cannot delve into the specifics.
translation_zh: 其他人只能提供一般性的概述，无法深入细节。

sentence: 我凑着茕茕孑立的小油灯，尽情享受秋灯夜读的乐趣
translation_en: I huddled by the solitary little oil lamp, relishing the pleasure of autumn night reading.
translation_zh: 我蜷缩在孤单的小油灯旁，享受秋夜阅读的乐趣。

sentence: 印刷用纸若是求过于供，便会影响出版品的及时问世
translation_en: If the demand for printing paper exceeds supply, it will delay the publication of books.
translation_zh: 如果印刷纸张的需求超过供应，将会延迟书籍的出版。

sentence: 在这个问题上，我们还是求同存异吧
translation_en: Let's agree to disagree on this issue.
translation_zh: 我们在这件事上各持己见吧。

sentence: 这篇小说写一个青年的心理变化，真可算是曲尽奇妙
